products.usageTips_en: Apply to a cotton pad and gently wipe over the face and neck. Repeat until the pad stays clean. No rinsing needed.
products.description_en:
# Wake up your skin's radiance with every cleanse 🍊

Specifically designed for combination to oily skin, **Celenes Micellar Water with Vitamin C** does more than just remove makeup: it revitalizes. Enriched with Sea Buckthorn extracts, it provides a powerful antioxidant effect that protects your skin while restoring its natural glow. Expect a regenerated skin texture and a fresh complexion, without ever disrupting your sebum balance.

**Key benefits:**
* **Instant Radiance Boost:** Vitamin C evens out skin tone and wakes up dull skin.
* **Antioxidant Shield:** Sea Buckthorn protects against environmental stressors.
* **Deep Cleansing:** Removes impurities and makeup without leaving any residue.
* **Gentle Formula:** Alcohol-free, it refreshes perfectly without drying out your skin.

💡 **Expert Tip:** This is the perfect micellar water for your morning routine! It removes excess sebum produced overnight while boosting your face's radiance to start the day right.
products.usageTips: Imbibez un coton et nettoyez délicatement votre visage et votre cou. Répétez l'application jusqu'à ce que le coton soit propre. Ne nécessite pas de rinçage. Convient à un usage quotidien.
Appliquer sur le visage, les yeux et les lèvres à l'aide d'un coton matin et soir. Recommencer jusqu'à ce que le coton soit propre. Sans rinçage.
products.usageTips_en: Apply to face, eyes, and lips using a cotton pad morning and night. Repeat until the pad stays clean. No rinsing needed.
products.description_en:
# Gentle purifying makeup removal ✨

**Venus Viderm Micellar Water** is specially designed for those seeking perfectly clean skin without harshness. Its hypoallergenic formula, made with over 90% natural ingredients, removes impurities and makeup in one simple step. Thanks to its purifying action, it leaves your skin feeling fresh, soft, and comfortable.

**Key benefits:**
* **High Tolerance:** Dermatologically and ophthalmologically tested (gentle on the eyes).
* **Clean Formula:** Free from soap, dyes, phthalates, and parabens.
* **3-in-1 Action:** Removes makeup, purifies, and soothes instantly.
* **Refreshing Feel:** A lightweight water texture that lets your skin breathe.

💡 **Expert Tip:** Perfect for skin prone to oiliness during the day. Use it morning and night to maintain healthy skin. No rinsing required, making it the perfect ally for your quick routines!
products.title_en: Viderm Purifying Micellar Water — Face, Eyes & Lips
products.composition: AQUA (WATER), METHYLPROPANEDIOL, PEG-6 CAPRYLIC/CAPRIC GLYCERIDES, XYLITYLGLUCOSIDE, ANHYDROXYLITOL, CETRIMONIUM BROMIDE, XYLITOL, PARFUM (FRAGRANCE), GLUCOSE.
products.title: Eau Micellaire Viderm Purifiante — Visage, Yeux & Lèvres
products.description:
Une eau micellaire purifiante pour nettoyer la peau sans l'agresser.

Elle retire le maquillage, les impuretés et l'excès de sébum en un seul geste. Sa formule douce laisse la peau fraîche, nette et confortable, sans sensation de tiraillement.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Démaquille le visage, les yeux et les lèvres.
- Aide à purifier la peau au quotidien.
- Formule hypoallergénique, sans savon, sans colorant, sans phtalates et sans paraben.
- Testée sous contrôle dermatologique et ophtalmologique.

**Astuce :** applique-la avec un coton, matin ou soir, sans frotter. Inutile de rincer.

products.title: Eau Rafraîchissante Protectrice SPF 50
products.description:
Une protection solaire SPF 50 légère, fraîche et invisible sur la peau.

Cette eau biphase protège contre les UVA et UVB tout en apportant une sensation de fraîcheur immédiate. Sa texture ne colle pas, ne graisse pas et ne laisse pas de traces blanches.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Haute protection SPF 50.
- Texture eau ultra-légère.
- Fini invisible, idéal pour le corps.
- Enrichie en Aloe Vera pour aider à garder la peau souple.

**Astuce :** secoue bien avant utilisation, puis applique généreusement avant l'exposition. Renouvelle souvent, surtout après baignade ou transpiration.
products.usageTips:
1. Agitez vigoureusement le flacon avant l'emploi pour mélanger les deux phases.
2. Vaporisez généreusement sur tout le visage et le corps avant l'exposition.
3. Pour le visage, évitez le contour des yeux.
4. Renouvelez l'application fréquemment, surtout après avoir nagé ou vous être essuyé.
products.composition: AQUA, DICAPRYLYL CARBONATE, PEG-7 GLYCERYL COCOATE, PROPYLENE GLYCOL, ALOE BARBADENSIS LEAF JUICE, TOCOPHEROL, PEG-40 CASTOR OIL, EDTA, GLYCERIN, ISOPROPYL MYRISTATE, SODIUM BENZOATE, POTASSIUM SORBATE, DIETHYLAMINO HYDROXYBENZOYL HEXYL BENZOATE, PEG-25 PABA, PARFUM MONOÏ.
products.usageTips_en:
1. Shake the bottle well before use to mix the two phases.
2. Spray generously over the entire face and body before sun exposure.
3. For the face, avoid the eye area.
4. Reapply frequently, especially after swimming, sweating, or towel drying.
products.description_en:
# A biphasic mist for ultra-fresh and invisible protection

MAKE Cosmetic's Protective Refreshing Water is a cutting-edge biphasic formula that instantly shields the skin from UVA and UVB damage. Its ultra-light, non-sticky texture refreshes the skin while delivering high sun protection. Enriched with Aloe Vera, it deeply hydrates without leaving any white marks.

**Why you'll love it:**
* **High Protection:** SPF 50 rating for reliable UV defense.
* **Invisible Finish:** A lightweight water texture that absorbs quickly with no greasy residue.
* **Deep Hydration:** Rich in Aloe Vera to keep skin hydrated and soft.
* **Waterproof:** Designed to stay effective during water activities.
* **Instant Refreshment:** Cools and refreshes the body immediately upon application.

products.usageTips: Imbibez un coton et nettoyez délicatement le visage et les yeux. Répétez jusqu'à ce que le coton soit propre. Sans rinçage.
products.usageTips_en: Soak a cotton pad and gently cleanse the face and eyes. Repeat until the pad comes away clean. No rinsing required.
products.description_en:
# Purified and fresh skin, with no tightness 💧

**Celenes Thermal Micellar Water** is the perfect solution for gently removing makeup and cleansing oily or combination skin. Its special surfactant formula cleanses the face, eyes, and lips without the need for rubbing or rinsing. Enriched with bisabolol, it soothes sensitive areas while regulating excess oil for a perfectly clean and matte complexion.

**Why you'll love it:**
* **Triple Action:** Cleanses, removes makeup, and soothes in one single step.
* **Skin Friendly:** Alcohol-free and paraben-free, it respects your skin's natural balance.
* **Refreshing Effect:** Leaves an immediate feeling of purity without any greasy residue.
* **Soothing Care:** Bisabolol calms irritations for total skin comfort.

💡 **Expert Tip:** Although this micellar water is rinse-free, for combination skin, a quick splash of thermal water or clear water after use helps remove the last micelle residues and leaves your skin even more radiant.
products.composition: AQUA, THERMAL WATER, HEXYLENE GLYCOL, CAPRYLOYL GLYCINE, XYLITYLGLUCOSIDE, POLYGLYCERYL-4 LAURATE/SEBACATE, POLYGLYCERYL-6 CAPRYLATE/CAPRATE, ANHYDROXYLITOL, XYLITOL, MAGNESIUM ASPARTATE, ZINC GLUCONATE, COPPER GLUCONATE, POLAXAMER 184, CAPRYLYL/CAPRYL GLUCOSIDE, DISODIUM EDTA, CAPRYLYL GLYCOL, ETHYLHEXYLGLYCERIN, SAPONINS, CITRIC ACID.
products.title: Eau Thermale Micellaire Nettoyante
products.description:
Une eau micellaire douce pour nettoyer les peaux mixtes à grasses sans les dessécher.

Elle démaquille le visage, les yeux et les lèvres sans besoin de frotter. Sa formule aide à retirer les impuretés, à rafraîchir la peau et à calmer les zones sensibles.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Nettoie, démaquille et apaise en un geste.
- Aide à limiter l'excès de sébum.
- Sans alcool et sans paraben.
- Convient aux routines simples du matin ou du soir.

**Résultat :** la peau est propre, fraîche et plus confortable, sans effet gras.

products.title: Effaclar MAT+
products.description:
Un soin hydratant pensé pour les peaux grasses qui brillent vite.

Effaclar MAT+ hydrate tout en aidant à contrôler l'excès de sébum. Sa texture légère laisse un fini mat, plus net, avec des pores visiblement moins marqués.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Aide à réduire la brillance.
- Affine l'apparence des pores.
- Hydrate sans alourdir la peau.
- Formulé avec l'eau thermale de La Roche-Posay.

**Pour qui :** idéal si ta peau devient brillante dans la journée, surtout sur la zone T.
products.usageTips:
1. Appliquer matin et/ou soir sur l'ensemble du visage.
2. Utiliser sur une peau préalablement nettoyée avec un gel moussant adapté.
products.usageTips_en:
1. Apply morning and/or evening to the entire face.
2. Apply to skin that has been thoroughly cleansed with a gentle cleanser.
products.description_en:
# Sebo-controlling moisturiser for anti-shine and anti-enlarged pores

Effaclar MAT+ is a daily moisturiser specifically designed for oily skin. It targets sebum production at its source to neutralise shine and visibly reduce the appearance of enlarged pores. Your skin is left feeling hydrated, matte, and refined.

**Why you'll love it:**
* **Anti-Shine Action:** Instantly targets oil for a long-lasting matte finish.
* **Pore Refiner:** Helps to reduce the appearance of enlarged pores and smooth skin texture.
* **Soothing Formula:** Formulated with La Roche-Posay Thermal Spring Water.
* **Clinically Proven:** Tested on oily, acne-prone skin.

💡 **Expert tip:** Thanks to its oil-absorbing properties, Effaclar MAT+ works perfectly as a primer. It helps your makeup stay in place longer without becoming greasy.
products.composition: AQUA / WATER • GLYCERIN • DIMETHICONE • ISOCETYL STEARATE • ALCOHOL DENAT. • SILICA [NANO] / SILICA • DIMETHICONE / VINYL • DIMETHICONE CROSSPOLYMER • ACRYLAMIDE / SODIUM • ACRYLOYLDI METHYLTAURATE • COPOLYMER • METHYL METHACRYLATE • CROSSPOLYMER • BUTYLENE GLYCOL • PEG-100 STEARATE • COCAMIDE MEA • SARCOSINE • GLYCERYL STEARATE • TRIETHANOLAMINE • ISOHEXADECANE • PERLITE • CAPRYLOYL SALICYLIC ACID • TETRASODIUM EDTA • PENTYLENE GLYCOL • POLYSORBATE 80 • ACRYLATES/C10-30 • ALKYL ACRYLATE CROSSPOLYMER • SALICYLIC ACID • PARFUM / FRAGRANCE

TALC, MICA, KAOLIN, MAGNESIUM STEARATE, ZINC STEARATE, MINERAL OIL, ISOPROPYL MYRISTATE, PROPYL PARABEN, METHYL PARABEN.
MAY CONTAIN (+/-): TITANIUM DIOXIDE (CI 77891), RED CALCIUM LAKE (CI 15850), RED ALUMINUM LAKE (CI 45410), RED BARIUM LAKE (CI 15850), IRON OXIDES (CI 77499), FRAGRANCE.
products.description_en:
# Natural Glow & Long-Lasting Wear

Enhance your cheekbones with Elegance Blusher, a silky-textured blush designed to provide a touch of natural color and a velvety finish. Its highly pigmented formula blends effortlessly into the skin for a seamless result, ranging from a subtle glow to a more intense pop of color depending on your mood.

**Why you'll love it:**

* **Silky Texture:** A fine powder enriched with talc and mica that glides onto the skin without accentuating dry areas.
* **Velvety Finish:** Provides a natural matte look that instantly brightens the complexion.
* **Easy Application:** Blends perfectly to prevent harsh lines and ensure a professional finish.
* **Compact Design:** Features a stylish "diamond" effect case, perfect for on-the-go touch-ups.
* **Versatile Shades:** Available in several hues (pink, coral, peach) to suit all skin tones.
products.usageTips_en:
1. Sweep a small amount of powder onto a blush brush.
2. Smile to find the "apples" of your cheeks.
3. Apply the blush in light circular motions, blending upwards toward the temples for a lifting effect.
4. Build the intensity by adding more product until you reach your desired look.
products.usageTips:
1. Prélevez une petite quantité de poudre à l'aide d'un pinceau à fard à joues.
2. Souriez pour identifier le "rebondi" de vos pommettes.
3. Appliquez le fard par mouvements circulaires légers, en remontant vers les tempes pour un effet liftant.
4. Modulez l'intensité en ajoutant de la matière selon le résultat souhaité.
products.description:
Un blush poudre pour réveiller le teint en quelques secondes.

Sa texture fine se fond facilement sur la peau et permet d'obtenir un effet naturel ou plus intense selon la quantité appliquée. Il apporte de la couleur sans démarcation et donne bonne mine tout de suite.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Texture douce et facile à estomper.
- Fini velouté, naturel sur la peau.
- Couleur modulable selon l'envie.
- Parfait pour structurer les pommettes.

**Astuce :** commence avec peu de produit, puis ajoute une deuxième couche si tu veux un rendu plus visible.
products.title: Elegance Blusher
Elegance Highlither Poudre
products.description:
Un highlighter poudre pour apporter de la lumière au visage sans effet lourd.

Sa texture fine capte la lumière et se travaille facilement. Tu peux l'utiliser pour un glow discret en journée ou un éclat plus intense le soir.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Illumine les zones clés du visage.
- Texture poudre douce et facile à appliquer.
- Intensité modulable.
- Joli rendu sur les pommettes, l'arcade sourcilière et l'arête du nez.

**Astuce :** applique-le par petites touches pour garder un éclat élégant et naturel.
products.usageTips:
1. Préparation : Assurez-vous que votre teint est unifié.
2. Application : Appliquez au pinceau ou au doigt sur les zones qui accrochent naturellement la lumière.
3. Zones clés : Le haut des pommettes, l'arcade sourcilière, l'arête du nez et l'arc de Cupidon.
products.usageTips_en:
1. Preparation: Ensure your foundation is even.
2. Application: Apply with a brush or fingertips to the high points of the face.
3. Key Areas: Cheekbones, brow bones, the bridge of the nose, and the Cupid's bow.
products.description_en:
# Pure & Sophisticated Glow

Light up your features with the Elegance Highlighter, the ultimate finishing touch for a radiant complexion. Its ultra-fine, silky powder texture melts into the skin to provide a custom glow, ranging from a natural sheen to an intense brilliance. Housed in a luxurious crystal-cut compact, it captures and reflects light from every angle.

** Why you'll love it:**

* **Multidimensional Glow:** Light-reflecting pigments for a high-definition glowy finish.
* **Silky Texture:** Seamless application that doesn't emphasize pores or look cakey.
* **Buildable Intensity:** Perfect for everyday wear (light dust) or glamorous evening looks (strobing effect).
* **Long-Lasting:** Stays bright and in place all day without fading.
* **Luxury Design:** A transparent, crystal-like case that looks stunning on any vanity.

** Available Shades:**
* **N°1 (Silver/White):** A polar glow ideal for fair skin tones or a frosted effect.
* **N°2 (Champagne Gold):** The universal shade for a warm, elegant glow.
* **N°3 (Bronze/Copper):** Perfect for medium to deep skin tones or enhancing a tan.

products.composition: TALC, MICA, PARAFFINUM LIQUIDUM, TOCOPHEROL, MAGNESIUM STEARATE, POLYETHYLENE, KAOLIN, DIMETHICONE, BIS-DIGLYCERYL POLYACY LADIPATE-2, TITANIUM DIOXIDE, SILICA, PROPYLPARABEN, BHA.
products.description_en:
# Tropical Energy & Solar Glow

Be bold with the Elegance Neon Orange palette by Maria Beauty®. This harmony of 9 high-energy shades is designed for those who want a warm, vibrant, and absolutely modern look. Featuring a blend of earthy tones and striking neon pops, create sun-kissed looks that are guaranteed to turn heads.

**Why you'll love it:**

* **Explosive Pigmentation:** High-pigment shadows for true, intense color from the very first application.
* **9 Warm Shades:** A perfect mix of velvety mattes (oranges, ochres) and sparkling shimmers (golds, coppers).
* **Long-Lasting Wear:** A fine texture that doesn't crease or fade, ensuring a flawless look until evening.
* **Versatile Palette:** Allows you to create everything from natural "sunset" gradients to sharp, artistic editorial looks.
* **Integrated Mirror:** A sleek, elegant silver compact, perfect for applying your makeup on the go.

> **Beauty Tip:** To make the "Neon" shades truly pop, apply a light-colored eyeshadow base before use. Blend the matte shades into the crease and finish with a touch of gold in the center of the eyelid.

**Palette Details:**
* **N°04 (Neon Orange):** A vibrant selection of bright yellows, coral oranges, warm browns, and golden greens.
products.description:
Une palette chaude et vibrante pour créer des looks solaires.

Ses 9 teintes mélangent des tons orangés, ocres, dorés et cuivrés. Les fards permettent un maquillage doux au quotidien ou un regard plus intense quand tu veux quelque chose de plus marqué.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- 9 couleurs chaudes faciles à associer.
- Teintes mates et lumineuses.
- Pigmentation intense dès le premier passage.
- Texture qui se travaille facilement au pinceau.

**Pour qui :** parfaite si tu aimes les maquillages chauds, lumineux et visibles.
products.title: Elegance Neon Orange Eyeshadow
Elegance Neon Pink Eyeshadow
products.description:
Une palette rose intense pour un regard doux, coloré ou carrément audacieux.

Elle réunit 9 teintes vibrantes, du rose romantique aux nuances plus électriques. Les couleurs se fondent facilement pour créer un maquillage simple, lumineux ou très affirmé.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- 9 teintes roses et vibrantes.
- Pigmentation riche et visible.
- Texture facile à estomper.
- Permet des looks discrets ou plus créatifs.

**Astuce :** utilise une teinte claire sur la paupière mobile et une teinte plus vive en coin externe pour intensifier le regard.
products.description_en:
# Bold Colors & Infinite Glow

Make a statement with the Elegance Neon Pink palette by Maria Beauty®. Designed for those who love to play with intensity, this palette is a true invitation to self-expression. Its selection of 9 vibrant shades offers exceptional pigmentation that melts into the skin to create looks ranging from romantic pink to the most electric neon. The silky, blendable texture ensures a professional finish that lasts all day.

**Why you'll love it:**

* **Intense Pigmentation:** Rich, saturated colors from the very first stroke for a captivating gaze.
* **9-Shade Harmony:** An expert blend of deep matte finishes and sparkling shimmers.
* **Seamless Blending:** A fine powder formula that blends effortlessly for a flawless, streak-free result.
* **Travel-Friendly:** A sleek silver compact with a built-in mirror, perfect for touch-ups on the go.
* **Superior Quality:** Carefully formulated and proudly made in Algeria.

> **Beauty Tip:** For maximum intensity with the shimmer shades, apply them directly with your fingertips by tapping onto the center of the lid. Use a blending brush for the matte shades to create a perfect gradient in the crease.

**Palette Details:**
* **N°05:** A vibrant harmony of 9 colors featuring neon pinks, deep mauves, and magnetic plums.
products.composition: TALC, MICA, PARAFFINUM LIQUIDUM, TOCOPHEROL, MAGNESIUM STEARATE, POLYETHYLENE, KAOLIN, DIMETHICONE, BIS-DIGLYCERYL POLYACY LADIPATE-2, TITANIUM DIOXIDE, SILICA, PROPYLPARABEN, BHA.

products.description_en:
# Natural Softness & Sophisticated Glow

Enhance your gaze with the Elegance Nude Light palette by Maria Beauty®. A true makeup bag essential, this palette celebrates natural beauty with a harmony of neutral and rosy tones. Its silky texture and buildable pigmentation allow you to create an infinity of looks, from ultra-discreet "no-makeup" styles to more elaborate, luminous designs. Each shadow is designed to melt into the eyelid, providing a professional finish that stays flawless from morning until night.

**Why you'll love it:**

* **Universal Harmony:** 9 carefully selected shades designed to suit every skin tone.
* **Mix of Textures:** A perfect combination of velvety mattes for definition and shimmering/glittery textures to catch the light.
* **Buildable Pigmentation:** Easy-to-blend colors, ideal for achieving effortless, perfect gradients.
* **Long-Lasting Wear:** A high-performance formula that doesn't crease and maintains its intensity throughout the day.
* **Luxury Packaging:** A sleek silver compact with a built-in mirror, elegant and practical for quick touch-ups.

> **Beauty Tip:** For a fresh daytime look, apply a light matte shade over the entire lid and blend a darker tone into the crease. To transition to an evening look, add a pop of glittery shadow to the center of the lid for instant brilliance.

**Palette Details:**
* **N°03 (Nude Light):** An expert blend of dusty roses, soft mauves, warm siennas, and sparkling pearlescent shades.
products.composition: TALC, MICA, PARAFFINUM LIQUIDUM, TOCOPHEROL, MAGNESIUM STEARATE, POLYETHYLENE, KAOLIN, DIMETHICONE, BIS-DIGLYCERYL POLYACY LADIPATE-2, TITANIUM DIOXIDE, SILICA, PROPYLPARABEN, BHA.
products.description:
Une palette nude lumineuse pour maquiller les yeux facilement au quotidien.

Ses 9 teintes neutres et rosées permettent de créer un look très naturel ou un maquillage plus travaillé. Les fards se fondent bien sur la paupière et donnent un résultat doux, propre et élégant.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- 9 teintes faciles à porter.
- Idéale pour les looks nude, rosés ou lumineux.
- Texture soyeuse, simple à estomper.
- Intensité modulable selon l'occasion.

**Pour qui :** parfaite si tu veux une palette pratique, discrète et élégante pour tous les jours.
products.title: Elegance Nude Light Eyeshadow

products.description_en:
# Intense Look & Precision Line

Define your eyes with a deep, captivating look using the Nour Beauty® Waterproof Eyeliner. Engineered to withstand your busiest days, this felt-tip eyeliner combines a long-wear formula with an ultra-precise tip. It glides effortlessly across the eyelid to deliver clean, even lines, whether you want a subtle lash-line enhancement or a bold cat-eye. Its waterproof technology ensures quick drying with zero smudging or transferring from morning to night.

**Why you'll love it:**

* **Absolute Waterproof Wear:** Completely resistant to water, sweat, and humidity, keeping your eye makeup flawless all day long.
* **Ultra-Precise Tip:** The flexible yet firm felt tip offers total control for smooth, effortless lines.
* **Deep Jet Black:** Richly pigmented formula that delivers maximum intensity in just one single stroke.
* **Quick-Dry Formula:** Sets instantly upon application to prevent any transferring onto the upper eyelid.
* **Signature Design:** Features a lovely floral-patterned cap that beautifully coordinates with your Lip Teint collection.

> **Beauty Tip:** For a flawless wing, start by drawing a line outward from the outer corner of your eye toward the tail of your brow. Then, trace a thin line along your upper lash line starting from the inner corner, and connect the two. Always snap the cap tightly shut after use to prevent the tip from drying out.

**Key Features:**
* **Property:** Long-lasting Waterproof formula.
* **Color:** Jet Black.
products.description:
Un eyeliner feutre waterproof pour un trait noir net et intense.

Sa pointe précise glisse facilement sur la paupière et aide à tracer une ligne fine ou plus marquée. La formule sèche vite et tient bien, sans bavure ni transfert.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Noir intense dès le premier passage.
- Pointe feutre précise.
- Tenue waterproof.
- Idéal pour un ras de cils discret ou un cat-eye.

**Astuce :** commence par de petits traits au ras des cils, puis relie-les pour garder un tracé propre.
products.title: Eyeliner Feutre Waterproof

products.description_en:
# Perfect Glide & High Definition

Master your eyeliner wings with the Nour Beauty® Smooth Lines Eyeliner. Featuring an elegant, long tapered "quill" handle, this dip-style eyeliner offers maximum stability and a perfectly balanced grip for effortless control. Its fine, flexible tip delivers an ultra-fluid formula that glides seamlessly across the eyelid, creating flawless, crisp, and continuous lines without skipping. The ultimate tool for sharp graphic liner work and perfectly symmetrical cat-eyes.

**Why you'll love it:**

* **Ergonomic Quill Handle:** The elongated dip-liner design stabilizes your hand gestures, ensuring smudge-free application.
* **Seamless Glide (Smooth Lines):** A continuous fluid flow that prevents gaps, creating a sleek finish in a single stroke.
* **Fine Precision Tip:** Easily adjusts line thickness with surgical precision, from a subtle everyday look to dramatic statement wings.
* **Rich Pitch Black:** Deeply pigmented, rich formula that dries down to an opaque, intense finish immediately.
* **Signature Flowers Style:** Wrapped in the collection's delicate floral patterns, perfectly pairing with your Lip Teint collection.

> **Beauty Tip:** Rest your elbow on a flat surface to stabilize your hand. Place the tip close to your lash line and glide the quill brush from the center toward the outer corner of your eye, then connect from the inner corner. The fluid consistency gives you a few seconds to perfect your wing shape before it locks into place.

**Key Features:**
* **Line:** Flowers — Smooth Lines.
* **Color:** Jet Black.
products.title: Eyeliner Plume
products.description:
Un eyeliner plume pour tracer une ligne fluide avec plus de contrôle.

Son manche long aide à stabiliser le geste, tandis que sa pointe fine permet de dessiner un trait net sans accrocher la paupière. Il convient aussi bien aux lignes fines qu'aux looks plus graphiques.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Prise en main stable et confortable.
- Pointe fine pour un tracé précis.
- Formule fluide et régulière.
- Pratique pour dessiner une virgule plus facilement.

**Pour qui :** idéal si tu veux un eyeliner précis mais plus simple à manier.

products.description_en:
# Perfect Definition & Microblading Effect

Achieve flawless, naturally full brows with the Nour Beauty® Eyebrow pen. Featuring an innovative four-pronged tip, this pen precisely mimics real hair strokes for a professional "microblading" effect at home. Its long-wear formula stands up to everything your day throws at it, ensuring a structured and defined gaze without any smudging.

**Why you'll love it:**

* **Hair-Like Strokes:** A unique slanted applicator to draw fine, natural-looking hairs.
* **Waterproof Formula:** Resistant to water, sweat, and humidity for 24-hour wear.
* **Natural Pigmentation:** Shades that blend seamlessly with your natural eyebrow color.
* **Quick-Dry Finish:** A clean application that won't transfer once set.
* **Maximum Precision:** Easy to use, even for beginners, to fill in sparse areas effortlessly.

> **Beauty Tip:** Apply to clean, dry brows. Hold the pen at a slight angle and draw small upward strokes following the direction of hair growth. For a more intense look, apply a second layer once the first has dried.

**Key Features:**
* **Finish:** Natural and precise.
* **Property:** Waterproof & Long-lasting.
products.title: Feutre à Sourcils Waterproof
products.description:
Un feutre à sourcils waterproof pour remplir les zones clairsemées avec un effet naturel.

Son embout à plusieurs pointes imite de petits poils pour structurer les sourcils sans effet trop dessiné. La formule tient bien dans la journée et aide à garder une ligne nette.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Effet poil à poil inspiré du microblading.
- Résiste à l'eau, à l'humidité et à la transpiration.
- Aide à combler les petits trous.
- Résultat naturel si on applique par touches légères.

**Astuce :** trace toujours dans le sens de pousse des poils pour un rendu plus doux.

products.title: Fit Me Matte + Poreless
products.description:
Un fond de teint matifiant pour un teint naturel, plus lisse et sans effet masque.

Fit Me Matte + Poreless aide à contrôler la brillance et à flouter l'apparence des pores. Sa texture légère unifie le teint tout en gardant un fini confortable.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Fini mat naturel.
- Aide à rendre les pores moins visibles.
- Texture légère, facile à étirer.
- Convient surtout aux peaux normales à grasses.

**Résultat :** le teint paraît plus net, plus uniforme et moins brillant.
products.usageTips:
*Préparation : Pour un résultat optimal sur peau grasse, appliquez une base de teint matifiante au préalable.
*Application : Appliquez une petite quantité de produit sur le front, le nez, les joues et le menton.
*Estompage : Étirez la matière vers l'extérieur du visage à l'aide de vos doigts, d'un pinceau ou d'une éponge pour un fini homogène.
products.usageTips_en:
* Preparation: For best results on oily skin, apply a mattifying primer beforehand.
* Application: Apply a small amount of product to the forehead, nose, cheeks, and chin.
* Blending: Blend outward from the center of the face using your fingers, a brush, or a sponge for an even finish.
products.description_en:
# The ultimate mattifying foundation for a flawless, natural look

Fit Me Matte + Poreless goes beyond skin tone matching to fit the unique texture issues of normal to oily skin. Infused with blurring micro-powders, this lightweight formula controls shine and blurs pores for a seamless, natural-matte finish that stays fresh for up to 12 hours.

**Why you'll love it:**
* **Natural Matte Finish :** Controls oil and shine for a clean, non-greasy look.
* **Pore Blurring :** Visibly minimizes the appearance of pores and refines skin texture.
* **Long-Lasting Wear :** Provides a beautiful finish that lasts up to 12 hours.
* **Skin Type :** Ideal for normal to oily skin.

💡 **Expert tip :** For the best results, use a makeup sponge or foundation brush to blend the product. Start with a thin layer and build up coverage only where needed to keep the finish looking skin-like.
products.composition: G853331 3 - INGREDIENTS: AQUA / WATER, CYCLOHEXASILOXANE, NYLON-12, ISODODECANE, ALCOHOL DENAT., CYCLOPENTASILOXANE, PEG-10 DIMETHICONE, CETYL PEG/PPG-10/1 DIMETHICONE, PEG-20, POLYGLYCERYL-4 ISOSTEARATE, DISTEARDIMONIUM HECTORITE, PHENOXYETHANOL, MAGNESIUM SULFATE, DISODIUM STEAROYL GLUTAMATE, HDI/TRIMETHYLOL HEXYLLACTONE CROSSPOLYMER, TITANIUM DIOXIDE [NANO] / TITANIUM DIOXIDE, METHYLPARABEN, ACRYLONITRILE/METHYL METHACRYLATE/VINYLIDENE CHLORIDE COPOLYMER, TOCOPHEROL, BUTYLPARABEN, ALUMINUM HYDROXIDE, ISOBUTANE, SILICA, PENTAERYTHRITYL TETRA-DI-T-BUTYL HYDROXYHYDROCINNAMATE. [+/- MAY CONTAIN: CI 77891 / TITANIUM DIOXIDE, CI 77491, CI 77492, CI 77499 / IRON OXIDES]. (F.I.L. D166390/3).

products.usageTips:
1. Retournez délicatement le boîtier fermé pour prélever un peu de poudre dans le tamis.
2. À l'aide d'un pinceau large ou d'une houppette, prélevez la matière et tapotez pour enlever l'excédent.
3. Appliquez sur l'ensemble du visage en insistant sur les zones qui ont tendance à briller (zone T).
4. Pour fixer l'anti-cernes (baking), laissez poser une couche généreuse sous les yeux pendant 2 minutes avant de balayer le surplus.
products.composition: TALC, MICA, KAOLIN, MAGNESIUM STEARATE, ZINC STEARATE, MINERAL OIL, ISOPROPYL MYRISTATE, PROPYL PARABEN, METHYL PARABEN, FRAGRANCE.
products.description_en:
# Flawless Long-Wear Makeup Setting

Nour Beauty Fix & Last 14h Loose Powder is the ultimate final step for makeup that stays put. Its lightweight, airy formula sets your foundation while providing a blurring effect that instantly smooths skin texture. Designed to withstand daily challenges, it is waterproof and ensures a perfect matte finish for up to 14 hours.

**Why you'll love it:**

* **Long-Lasting Hold:** Keeps your makeup in place for 14 hours without settling into fine lines.
* **Blurring Effect:** Minimizes the appearance of pores and imperfections for a "filter-like" finish.
* **Matte & Waterproof:** Controls shine and resists humidity and sweat all day long.
* **Ultra-Fine Loose Texture:** A weightless powder that doesn't feel heavy and allows the skin to breathe.
* **Versatile Use:** Perfect for "baking" techniques or as a simple finishing veil.
products.usageTips_en:
1. Gently tap the closed container to release a small amount of powder into the sifter.
2. Using a large powder brush or a puff, pick up the product and tap off any excess.
3. Apply all over the face, focusing on areas prone to oiliness (T-zone).
4. To set concealer (baking), apply a generous layer under the eyes, let it sit for 2 minutes, then sweep away the excess.
products.title: Fix & Last 14h Poudre Libre
products.description:
Une poudre libre pour fixer le maquillage et garder un fini mat plus longtemps.

Sa texture fine aide à lisser le grain de peau, à réduire la brillance et à maintenir le teint en place. Elle apporte un effet flouté sans alourdir le maquillage.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Fixe le maquillage jusqu'à 14h.
- Aide à flouter pores et petites imperfections.
- Fini mat et léger.
- Formule waterproof, pratique pour les longues journées.

**Astuce :** applique une petite quantité sur la zone T pour matifier sans figer le teint.

products.title: Fixateur de Maquillage Waterproof
products.description:
Un spray fixateur waterproof pour prolonger la tenue du maquillage.

Sa brume légère aide à sceller le teint sans changer son fini. Elle protège le maquillage de l'humidité, de la chaleur et des frottements, tout en apportant une sensation fraîche.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Aide le maquillage à tenir plus longtemps.
- Fini léger, sans effet collant.
- Formule waterproof.
- Pratique en dernière étape de la routine makeup.

**Astuce :** vaporise à distance du visage, puis laisse sécher sans toucher.
products.description_en:
# Long-Lasting Waterproof Make Up Fixer

Keep your makeup looking flawless from dawn to dusk with the Nour Beauty® Sprayer. This ultra-lightweight setting spray acts as an invisible shield to lock in your look without changing your finish. Its waterproof formula protects your beauty work against humidity, heat, and smudging, while providing an instant burst of freshness. It is the essential final step to prevent makeup from settling into fine lines or fading throughout the day.

**Why you'll love it:**

* **Extreme Hold:** Extends the wear of your makeup for a "just-applied" look that lasts for hours.
* **Waterproof Shield:** Resistant to sweat and moisture for total confidence in any situation.
* **Ultra-Fine Mist:** Even distribution that doesn't leave visible droplets or disturb your makeup pigments.
* **Natural Finish:** Seamlessly blends powders and foundations together for a more natural, less "cakey" appearance.
* **Weightless Feel:** Non-sticky formula that allows your skin to breathe comfortably.

> **Beauty Tip:** Once your makeup is complete, shake the bottle well. Close your eyes and spray about 8-12 inches (20-30 cm) from your face in an "X" and then a "T" motion for full coverage. Let it air dry for a few seconds.

**Key Features:**
* **Properties:** Waterproof & Transfer-proof.
* **Usage:** Suitable for all skin types.
products.composition: Phenoxy ethnol, Capom, Distiled water, Siliose, Propylene glycol, Ethyl hexyl glycerol, Bentain, Vitamine E

products.description_en:
# Radiant Foundation & Vitamin Care

Revive your complexion with the new Bourjois Paris Healthy Mix foundation. Combining high performance with naturality, this iconic formula is reinvented with a "Clean & Vegan" approach, featuring 85% ingredients of natural origin. Its lightweight, non-greasy texture instantly blurs imperfections while providing up to 24 hours of hydration for skin that looks fresh, radiant, and visibly rested.

**Why you'll love it:**

* **Vitamin Cocktail (C, E, B5):** Infused with essential vitamins to boost skin radiance and protect against external stressors.
* **Clean & Vegan Formula:** A skin-friendly composition, free from animal-derived ingredients.
* **Naturally Radiant Glow:** Delivers buildable coverage that allows skin to breathe for an instant "healthy-glow" finish.
* **Long-Lasting Hydration:** Keeps skin comfortable all day long without feeling heavy or cakey.
* **Anti-Fatigue Action:** Masks signs of tiredness for a revitalized and luminous look.

> **Beauty Tip:** Apply a small amount to the center of your face and blend outwards using a sponge or brush. Its fluid texture melts seamlessly into the skin for a streak-free result.

**Available Shades:**
* **50C Rose Ivory**
* **51W Light Vanilla**
* **52W Vanilla**
* **53W Light Beige**
products.description:
Un fond de teint lumineux pour un teint frais, naturel et plus reposé.

Healthy Mix unifie la peau tout en gardant une texture légère et confortable. Sa formule enrichie en vitamines aide à donner de l'éclat sans fini gras.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Teint plus uniforme et lumineux.
- Texture légère, non grasse.
- Jusqu'à 24h d'hydratation.
- Formule clean & vegan avec 85% d'ingrédients d'origine naturelle.

**Pour qui :** idéal si tu veux un fond de teint naturel qui réveille le teint sans l'alourdir.
products.title: Fond de Teint Éclat & Cocktail Vitaminé

products.usageTips: Appliquez sur le corps mouillé, massez doucement puis rincez à l'eau claire.
products.usageTips_en: Apply to wet body, massage gently and rinse with fresh water.
products.description_en:
# A burst of thirst-quenching freshness ✨

**Murj Shower Gel** transforms your daily routine into a true moment of escape. Its creamy texture cleanses your skin while providing an immediate feeling of vitality. Thanks to its unique blend of juicy melon and crisp cucumber, it leaves your skin infinitely soft, supple, and delicately scented.

**Why you'll love it:**
* **Refreshing Duo:** Melon and cucumber work together for an intense feeling of freshness.
* **Gentle Hydration:** Effectively cleanses while respecting the natural balance of the skin.
* **Vitamin-Rich Care:** Helps maintain the skin's radiance and vitality every day.
* **Rich Lather:** A fluid texture that transforms into a cloud of softness.

💡 **Expert Tip:** For even more toned skin, massage the gel for 3 minutes using circular motions. This stimulates microcirculation and allows the fresh extracts to fully revitalize your skin.
products.composition: Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Polyquaternium-7, Cocamide DEA, Coco-Glucoside, Chloride Sodium, Fragrance, Sodium Benzoate, Citric Acid, CI 77288, EDTA.
products.title: Gel Douche Hydratant (Melon & Concombre)
products.description:
Un gel douche frais pour réveiller la peau au quotidien.

Son parfum melon et concombre apporte une sensation désaltérante dès la douche. La texture nettoie en douceur et laisse la peau souple, fraîche et délicatement parfumée.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Parfum frais melon et concombre.
- Nettoie sans sensation de dessèchement.
- Mousse agréable et facile à rincer.
- Idéal pour une douche légère et tonique.

**Résultat :** la peau est propre, douce et plus fraîche.

products.title: Gel Douche Parfumée Sweet Obsession
products.description:
Un gel douche parfumé pour nettoyer la peau tout en douceur.

Sweet Obsession enveloppe la peau d'un parfum féminin et agréable. Sa formule avec glycérine et agents adoucissants aide à garder une peau confortable après la douche.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Parfum gourmand et enveloppant.
- Nettoie sans agresser la peau.
- Enrichi en glycérine.
- Sans savon, sans parabènes et sans colorants.

**Astuce :** parfait quand tu veux une douche qui laisse une vraie sensation de peau douce et parfumée.
products.usageTips: Appliquez une noisette de gel sur la peau humide, faites mousser sur l'ensemble du corps, puis rincez abondamment à l'eau claire.
products.composition: Aqua (Water), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Lauryl Glucoside, Coco-Glucoside & Glyceryl Oleate, PEG-7 Glyceryl Cocoate, Glycerin, Caprylyl/Capryl Glucoside, Sodium Chloride, PEG-120 Methyl Glucose Dioleate, Cetearyl Isononanoate, Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin, Parfum (Fragrance).
products.usageTips_en: Apply a small amount of gel to damp skin, lather all over the body, then rinse thoroughly with clear water.
products.description_en:
# A scented embrace for velvety skin ✨

Indulge in the **Sweet Obsession Fragrance Shower Gel**. Its soft, creamy texture gently cleanses your skin while wrapping it in a captivating fragrance. Enriched with glycerin and plant-based softening agents, this gel respects your skin's natural balance, providing comfort and well-being every day. A "Clean formula" free from soap, parabens, and colorants for fresh, hydrated skin.

**Why you'll love it:**
* **Captivating Scent:** A unique olfactory signature that leaves a delightful trail on your skin.
* **Plant-Based Softness:** Contains natural softening agents for supple, velvety skin.
* **Gentle Care:** pH balanced and dermatologically tested to ensure maximum skin comfort.
* **Clean Beauty:** 0% soap, 0% parabens, 0% colorants.

💡 **Expert Tip:** To prolong this sensorial experience and make the fragrance last all day, apply the matching "Sweet Obsession" Body Lotion immediately after showering while your skin is still warm.

products.title: Gel Douche Surgras (Peaux Sèches)
products.description:
Un gel douche surgras pensé pour les peaux sèches.

Sa formule au lait et à l'huile d'amande douce nettoie tout en aidant à nourrir la peau. Il limite la sensation de tiraillement et laisse la peau plus souple après la douche.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Formule surgras adaptée aux peaux sèches.
- Enrichi en lait et huile d'amande douce.
- Aide à protéger du dessèchement.
- Laisse la peau plus confortable.

**Pour qui :** idéal si ta peau tiraille après la douche ou manque de nutrition.
products.usageTips: Versez une petite quantité de gel dans la main ou sur une éponge. Appliquez sur l'ensemble du corps mouillé, faites mousser délicatement, puis rincez abondamment.
products.composition: Aqua (Water), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Laureth-2, Sodium Chloride, Glycerin, Decyl Glucoside, Corylus Avellana (Hazel) Seed Oil, Prunus Amygdalus (Sweet Almond) Dulcis, Hydrolyzed Milk Protein, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Polyquaternium-39, Parfum (Fragrance), C12-13 Alkyl Lactate, Zea Mays Oil, Calcium Pantothenate, Inositol, PEG-20 Castor Oil, Lactic Acid, Lecithin, Retinol, Tocopheryl Acetate, Rosa Moschata Seed Oil, Tocopherol, Styrene/Acrylates Copolymer, Tetrasodium EDTA, Alcohol Denat., Biotin, Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Limonene, Benzyl Salicylate, Phenoxyethanol, C.I. 19140 (Acid Yellow 23), C.I. 17200 (Acid Red 33).
products.usageTips_en: Pour a small amount of gel into your hand or onto a sponge. Apply to the entire wet body, lather gently, and rinse thoroughly.
products.description_en:
# The regenerating power of milk for your skin ✨

**Lactovit Extra Rich (Surgras) Shower Gel** is more than just a cleanser. Formulated with 100% natural milk microspheres, it acts at the cellular level to stimulate growth and strengthen your skin barrier. Enriched with sweet almond oil, this nourishing care protects your skin from dryness while restoring its natural glow. A true health boost for dry skin.

**Why you'll love it:**
* **Innovative Technology:** Milk microspheres (proteins, vitamins, and minerals) that target your skin's specific needs.
* **Intense Nutrition:** Sweet almond oil deeply nourishes and soothes tightness.
* **3-in-1 Action:** Stimulates cell renewal, enhances cell survival, and reinforces the skin barrier.
* **Daily Gentleness:** Dermatologically tested, paraben-free formula that respects the skin's natural pH.

💡 **Expert Tip:** Dry skin requires extra care. Avoid very hot water which can strip away natural oils. Apply this extra-rich gel gently and dry your skin by patting with a towel rather than rubbing to preserve the nourishing benefits of the milk proteins.

products.description:
Un gel douche surgras pour nettoyer les peaux sèches sans les fragiliser.

Enrichi en glycérine et beurre de karité, il aide à maintenir l'hydratation et à protéger la peau du dessèchement. Sa texture douce convient aussi aux routines familiales.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Nettoie en douceur.
- Aide à garder la peau hydratée.
- Beurre de karité pour plus de confort.
- Convient aux peaux sèches et déshydratées.

**Résultat :** la peau est propre, souple et moins inconfortable.
products.title: Gel Douche Surgras Hydratant
products.composition: AQUA, SODIUM LAURETH SULFATE, GLYCERIN, SODIUM CHLORIDE, PARFUM, COCAMIDOPROPYL BETAINE, PROPYLENE GLYCOL, CARAMEL, UREA, CETRIMONIUM CHLORIDE, BUTYROSPERMUM PARKII BUTTER, PRUNUS AMYGDALUS DULCIS OIL, LINALOOL, 5-BROMO-5-NITRO-1,3-DIOXANE, CITRIC ACID, CI 19140, CI 16255.
products.description_en:
# A world of gentleness for the whole family ✨

Evoluderm Surgras Shower Gel is specially designed to care for dry and dehydrated skin. Enriched with 7% Glycerin and Shea Butter, it gently cleanses while providing deep, long-lasting hydration. Its protective formula helps combat daily stressors like hard water, cold, and heat, leaving your skin supple, soft, and delicately scented.

**Why you'll love it:**
* **Intense Hydration:** Glycerin locks moisture into the cells and boosts hydration levels.
* **Deep Nutrition:** Shea Butter nourishes and shields the skin from drying out.
* **Skin Respect:** Dermatologically tested with a neutral pH and soap-free formula.

💡 **Expert Tip:** After exposure to cold or a workout, use this shower gel with lukewarm water instead of very hot. The combination of the surgras formula and a gentle temperature preserves the skin's hydrolipidic film, preventing any post-shower tightness.
products.usageTips_en: Apply to the entire wet body, lather with gentle massages, then rinse thoroughly. Suitable for daily use for the whole family.
products.usageTips: Appliquez sur l'ensemble du corps mouillé, faites mousser par de légers massages, puis rincez abondamment. Adapté à l'usage quotidien pour toute la famille.

products.description_en:
# Extreme Hold & "Soap Brow" Look

Tame your brows and lock your style in place all day with the Gabrini Brow Fixing Gel. This innovative gel delivers the trendy "Soap Effect" finish, flattening and defining each hair without leaving white flakes or a sticky residue. Its universal transparent formula is perfect for achieving a lifted, structured gaze in one easy step.

**Why you'll love it:**

* **Long-Lasting Hold:** Ultra-strong fixation that keeps your eyebrows in place from morning until night.
* **Soap Brows Effect:** Easily lifts and brushes brows upward for a full, modern, and feathery look.
* **Invisible Finish:** A crystal-clear gel that leaves no trace, ideal for use alone or over brow pencil.
* **Quick-Dry Formula:** Instantly sets the desired shape without making brow hairs feel overly stiff.
* **Precision Brush:** Comes with a specialized wand for easy, even application every time.

> **Beauty Tip:** For a "Lamination" effect, brush your brows upward with the gel, then use the wand handle to gently press the hairs against the skin to lock them flat for a sleek finish.

**Key Features:**
* **Product Type:** Transparent fixing gel.
* **Result:** Lifted, set, and perfectly groomed eyebrows.
products.composition: Aqua, Ceteareth 25, Glycerin, Propylene Glycol, Phenoxyethanol, Triethanolamine, Ethylhexylglycerin, Partum, Coumorin.
products.title: Gel Fixateur de Sourcils

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Fixe les sourcils toute la journée.
- Effet soap brows moderne.
- Fini transparent et naturel.
- Peut s'utiliser seul ou après un crayon à sourcils.

**Astuce :** brosse vers le haut pour un effet lifté, puis replace légèrement la ligne si besoin.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Nettoie efficacement sans frotter fort.
- Aide à préserver le confort de la peau.

**How to use it?**
Apply a small amount of gel to damp face and neck. Gently massage in circular motions, avoiding the eye area, then rinse thoroughly with clear water.

*Daily use, morning and night.*
products.description_en:
# The purity of thermal water for your skin 🌊

Give your face a deep cleanse with absolute gentleness. This **Micellar Foaming Gel** uses innovative technology to capture excess oil and impurities while preserving natural moisture. Its plant-extract-rich formula leaves skin clean, fresh, and perfectly balanced.

**What makes the difference:**
* **Micellar Technology:** Effectively cleanses by attracting impurities like a magnet, without the need for harsh scrubbing.
* **Botanical Cocktail:** Enriched with chamomile, camellia, and cucumber extracts to soothe, soften, and revitalize the skin with every wash.
* **Clean Formula:** Paraben-free and alcohol-free to respect the skin's pH and prevent the "rebound effect" (excess oil production after harsh cleansing).

💡 **Expert Tip:** This cleanser is perfect for "double cleansing." Use it after your regular makeup remover to eliminate final residues. Massage well around the nose and chin (typically oilier areas) to fully benefit from the purifying action of the cucumber extract.
products.usageTips:
**Comment l'utiliser ?**
Appliquez une petite quantité de gel sur le visage et le cou préalablement humidifiés. Massez délicatement par mouvements circulaires en évitant le contour des yeux, puis rincez abondamment à l'eau claire. 

*Utilisation quotidienne, matin et soir.*

products.description:
Un gel moussant à la vitamine C pour nettoyer et raviver l'éclat du teint.

Sa mousse légère élimine les impuretés, l'excès de sébum et les résidus de pollution. La formule aide à matifier la peau tout en apportant un effet plus lumineux.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Nettoie les peaux mixtes à grasses.
- Aide à réduire la brillance.
- Vitamine C pour un teint plus éclatant.
- Concombre et argousier pour une sensation fraîche.

**Résultat :** la peau paraît plus propre, plus nette et moins terne.
products.title: Gel Moussant Nettoyant à la Vitamine C
products.usageTips_en: Apply to wet skin, massage gently into a lather, and rinse thoroughly with water.

**Celenes Foaming Gel with Vitamin C** is the ultimate solution to purify combination to oily skin while boosting its glow. Its light foam gently washes away impurities, excess sebum, and pollution. Infused with Sea Buckthorn extract and cucumber, it helps minimize the appearance of blackheads and mattifies the skin without harshness.

**Key benefits:**
* **Natural Glow:** Vitamin C restores radiance to dull skin.
* **Purifying Action:** Helps tighten pores and prevent blemishes.
* **Antioxidant Shield:** Sea Buckthorn protects the skin against environmental stressors.
* **Clean Formula:** Paraben-free and alcohol-free to respect your skin's balance.

💡 **Expert Tip:** Massage a small amount onto a wet face, focusing on the T-zone. The cucumber in the formula provides an immediate refreshing sensation, perfect for waking up your skin in the morning!

- Nettoie les impuretés du quotidien.
- Collagène pour aider à maintenir la fermeté.
- Vitamine C pour booster l'éclat.

# Skin Regenerating & Lifting

Vogue Secret Age Purify Cleansing Gel is a comprehensive daily treatment designed to revitalize tired skin. Its advanced formula deeply cleanses the skin while restoring firmness and radiance. Enriched with collagen and vitamins, this gel helps regenerate skin tissue and protects against dryness for a visibly younger and more toned appearance.

**Why you'll love it:**

* **Lifting Effect:** Infused with Collagen to help firm and tighten the skin.
* **Radiance Boost:** Contains 5% Vitamin C to brighten the complexion and reduce signs of fatigue.
* **Antioxidant Protection:** Enriched with Vitamin E to protect cells against premature aging.
* **Revitalizing Action:** Peach extract and provitamins cleanse while regenerating the skin barrier.
* **Gentle Texture:** Effectively cleanses without stripping, leaving skin feeling supple and hydrated.

> **Note:** Perfectly suited for tired skin lacking firmness.

**Expert Advice:** With its 5% Vitamin C concentration, this cleanser is an excellent starting point for an anti-aging routine. For an optimal "lift" effect, focus on the jawline during your massage to stimulate blood circulation before applying your regular serum.

💡 **Expert Tip:** Apply a small amount to wet face twice a day. Gently massage, focusing on the T-zone (forehead, nose, chin), then rinse thoroughly. For best results, follow up with a Vitamin C serum.

products.description_en:
# Radiance & Freshness Boost

Vogue Secret Skin Detox Cleansing Gel is a purifying daily treatment designed to revitalize mixed and dull skin types. Its triple-action formula deeply cleanses while freeing the skin from accumulated impurities. By combining ascorbic acid and zinc, it helps clarify the complexion and regulate pore appearance for fresh, healthy, and glowing skin.

**Why you'll love it:**

* **Intense Detox :** Removes impurities and pollution residue to thoroughly purify the skin.
* **Radiance Booster :** Contains ascorbic acid (Vitamin C) to brighten dull complexions.
* **Oil Control :** Enriched with 2% Zinc to help mattify and clear the skin.
* **Refined Texture :** Niacinamide helps reduce the appearance of pores and smooth the skin's surface.
* **Fresh Sensation :** Leaves the skin feeling clean, fresh, and perfectly prepared for your routine.

> **Note :** Perfectly suited for mixed and dull skin looking for purity and radiance.

**Expert Advice :** This gel is perfect for urban dwellers whose skin is exposed to pollution. The combination of 2% Zinc and Niacinamide makes it an excellent ally for preventing minor blemishes while maintaining a luminous glow.

products.description_en:
# Radiance & Renewal with Cranberry

Flux Care Anti-Aging Facial Cleansing Gel is a daily treatment designed to purify the skin while targeting signs of aging. Enriched with glycolic acid and cranberry extracts, this gel removes impurities and dead skin cells to reveal a fresher, smoother, and more radiant complexion. Its "Secret de Soin" formula perfectly prepares your skin for your anti-aging skincare routine.

**Why you'll love it:**

* **Gentle Exfoliation:** Contains glycolic acid to uniformly exfoliate the skin and refine its texture.
* **Antioxidant Power:** Enriched with Cranberry extract to protect and refresh the complexion.
* **Wrinkle Reduction:** Helps minimize the appearance of fine lines with regular use.
* **Hydration & Freshness:** Cleanses without stripping moisture, leaving the skin feeling hydrated and toned.
* **Clean Formula:** 0% paraben, silicone, and soap for a skin-friendly experience.

> **Note:** Suitable for all skin types, except for very sensitive skin due to the acid content.

**Expert Advice:** Since this gel contains glycolic acid (an active exfoliating agent), your skin may become more sensitive to the sun. It is strongly recommended to apply sun protection (SPF) every morning throughout the duration of this product's use to protect new skin cells and prevent the appearance of dark spots.
products.usageTips_en:
1. Apply a small amount of gel morning and evening to a damp face.
2. Gently massage in circular motions to create a lather, avoiding the eye area.
3. Rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water.

products.title: Gel Nettoyant Visage Anti-Boutons

Un gel nettoyant purifiant pour les peaux sujettes aux boutons.

Le charbon végétal aide à absorber l'excès de sébum, tandis que l'acide salicylique accompagne les peaux à imperfections. Il nettoie en profondeur sans laisser la peau lourde ou étouffée.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Aide à purifier les pores.
- Charbon végétal contre les impuretés.
- Acide salicylique pour les imperfections.
- Convient aux peaux grasses à tendance acnéique.

**Astuce :** hydrate toujours après le nettoyage pour garder une peau équilibrée.

**Massage :** Effectuez des mouvements circulaires doux.
**Rinçage :** Rincez abondamment à l'eau claire.
products.description_en:
# Charcoal & Salicylic Acid

Flux Care Anti-Blemish Cleansing Gel is a powerful solution designed for acne-prone skin. Formulated with charcoal and salicylic acid, it deep cleanses the skin, absorbs excess oil, and helps prevent breakouts and imperfections. Its "Secret de Soin" formula removes impurities while tightening dilated pores without disrupting the skin's natural moisture.

**Why you'll love it:**

* **Deep Purification:** Charcoal acts like a magnet to draw out impurities and blackheads.
* **Anti-Blemish Action:** Salicylic acid helps exfoliate and unclog pores to reduce breakouts.
* **Oil Control:** Mattifies the skin by regulating sebum production.
* **Pore Tightening:** Refines skin texture for a smoother-looking face.
* **Clean Formula:** 0% paraben, silicone, and soap for daily care.

**Expert Advice:** For maximum effectiveness on stubborn areas (like the nose or chin), massage the gel for a full minute before rinsing. This allows the salicylic acid enough time to work deep within the pores. If you experience dryness, alternate with a gentle cleanser every other night.
products.usageTips_en:
**Preparation:** Dampen your face with lukewarm water.
**Application:** Apply a small amount of product to the entire face.
**Massage:** Gently massage in circular motions.
**Rinsing:** Rinse thoroughly with clean water.

products.description_en:
# Vitamin C & Honey Extract

Flux Care Anti-Dark Spot Cleansing Gel is a brightening treatment specially designed for sensitive and dull skin. Enriched with Vitamin C and honey extract, this gel gently cleanses while targeting hyperpigmentation. Its formula, rich in natural active ingredients, helps reduce signs of fatigue and minimize dark spots to reveal an even and radiant complexion.

**Why you'll love it:**

* **Dark Spot Action:** Vitamin C helps reduce the appearance of dark spots and prevent new ones from forming.
* **Instant Glow:** Restores radiance to dull and tired complexions.
* **Soothing Softness:** Honey extract nourishes and calms sensitive skin during cleansing.
* **Even Skin Tone:** Works on the overall harmony of the skin's color.
* **Clean Formula:** 0% paraben, silicone, and soap.

**Expert Advice:** Vitamin C is a powerful ally against spots, but it can make skin more light-sensitive. To ensure this cleanser's effectiveness and prevent spots from returning, applying sunscreen (SPF) every morning is essential.

Enrichi en collagène et vitamine E, il retire les impuretés et l'excès de sébum sans dessécher la peau. Le visage paraît plus propre, plus frais et plus lumineux.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Nettoie sans tiraillement.
- Collagène pour accompagner la fermeté de la peau.
- Vitamine E pour aider à protéger du stress oxydatif.
- Bon premier geste dans une routine anti-âge simple.

**Résultat :** la peau est nette, fraîche et prête pour les soins.
products.title: Gel Nettoyant Visage Collagène & Vitamine E
products.usageTips_en:
1. Wet the skin.
2. Apply to hands, then add water to lather.
3. Gently massage onto the face. Rinse thoroughly.
4. Start with one application daily, increasing to twice a day if needed.
products.description_en:
# A youthful glow with every wash ✨

Chaline Infinity Cleansing Gel is a daily skincare essential designed to purify your skin while preserving its youthful radiance. Featuring rigorously selected mild cleansing agents, it effectively removes impurities and excess sebum without drying out the skin. Enriched with Collagen and Vitamin E, this formula helps protect cells against oxidative stress, leaving your complexion clean, refreshed, and looking healthy.

**Why you'll love it:**
* **Youth Preservation:** Infused with Collagen to help maintain the skin's natural firmness and glow.
* **Antioxidant Shield:** Vitamin E works to protect skin cells from environmental damage and oxidative stress.
* **Gentle Daily Care:** Formulated for optimal tolerance, making it perfect for daily use on all skin types.

💡 **Expert tip:** For a deeper clean, massage the gel onto your face for at least 60 seconds. This gives the active ingredients like collagen more time to benefit the skin before you rinse it off.
products.composition: EAU TRAITÉE, COLLAGÈNE, VITAMINE E, DISODIUM EDTA, SODIUM COCOYL ISETHIONATE, GLYCÉRINE, SODIUM COCOYL TAURATE, POLYSORBATE 20, ACIDE CITRIQUE, CHLORURE DE SODIUM, ACIDE ASCORBIQUE, PARFUM.
products.title_en: Collagen & Vitamin E Facial Cleansing Gel
products.usageTips:
1. Mouiller la peau.
2. Appliquer sur les mains, puis ajouter de l'eau.
3. Masser délicatement le visage. Rincer abondamment.
4. Commencer par une application par jour, puis passer à deux fois si nécessaire.

products.usageTips_en:
1. **Preparation:** Dampen your face with lukewarm water.
2. **Application:** Apply a small amount of product to the entire face.
3. **Massage:** Gently massage in circular motions.
4. **Rinsing:** Rinse thoroughly with clean water.
products.description_en:
# Turmeric & Avocado Oil

Flux Care Brightening Cleansing Gel is a daily treatment designed to cleanse, brighten, and even out the skin tone while eliminating imperfections. Thanks to the combined action of turmeric and avocado oil, it improves skin texture by reducing roughness and dryness. Its formula effectively removes impurities, excess sebum, and makeup traces without drying out the skin.

**Why you'll love it:**

* **Even Complexion:** Turmeric helps brighten and harmonize the face's natural radiance.
* **Intense Nutrition:** Avocado oil nourishes the skin to reduce dryness and roughness.
* **Dark Circle Reduction:** Helps minimize the appearance of dark circles for a fresher look.
* **Gentle Cleansing:** Removes makeup and impurities while respecting the skin barrier.
* **Clean Formula:** 0% paraben, silicone, and soap.

**Expert Advice:** To maximize the brightening effect of turmeric, try rinsing with cool water after cleansing. This helps tighten the skin and boost microcirculation. Since this product targets dry skin, remember to apply your moisturizer immediately after patting dry to seal in the nourishment provided by the avocado oil.
products.composition: AQUA, COCAMIDOPROPYL BETAINE, SODIUM LAURETH SULFATE, GLYCERIN, CURCUMA LONGA ROOT EXTRACT (0,5%), PERSEA GRATISSIMA OIL (0,1%), PEG-40 HYDROGENATED CASTOR OIL, SALICYLIC ACID, COCO-GLUCOSIDE, POLYQUATERNIUM-7, SODIUM BENZOATE, AMINOMETHYL PROPANOL, PARFUM, PROPYLENE GLYCOL, DISODIUM EDTA, SODIUM CHLORIDE, METHYLCHLOROISOTHIAZOLINONE (AND) METHYLISOTHIAZOLINONE.
products.usageTips:
1. **Préparation :** Humidifiez votre visage à l'eau tiède.
2. **Application :** Appliquez une petite quantité de produit sur l'ensemble du visage.
3. **Massage :** Effectuez des mouvements circulaires doux.
4. **Rinçage :** Rincez abondamment à l'eau claire.
products.description:
Un gel nettoyant éclaircissant pour un teint plus uniforme et une peau plus douce.

Le curcuma aide à raviver l'éclat naturel, tandis que l'huile d'avocat apporte du confort à la peau. Il nettoie les impuretés, l'excès de sébum et les traces de maquillage sans dessécher.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Aide à unifier l'apparence du teint.
- Curcuma pour l'éclat.
- Huile d'avocat pour nourrir et adoucir.
- Nettoie sans laisser la peau rêche.

**Pour qui :** idéal si ta peau manque d'éclat ou présente des zones de sécheresse.
products.title: Gel Nettoyant Visage Éclaircissant
Gel-Crème Fraîcheur Intense

Sa texture non grasse pénètre vite et aide à protéger la peau des agressions urbaines. Les extraits de fleur d'amandier et de moringa apportent douceur, confort et éclat au quotidien.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Texture fraîche, légère et non collante.
- Aide à hydrater sans effet gras.

products.composition: AQUA (WATER) ; GLYCERIN ; PROPANEDIOL ; ISOAMYL LAURATE ; BETAINE ; POLYACRYLATE CROSSPOLYMER-6 ; PRUNUS AMYGDALUS DULCIS (SWEET ALMOND) FLOWER EXTRACT ; MORINGA OLEIFERA SEED EXTRACT ; PAEONIA LACTIFLORA ROOT EXTRACT ; BIOSACCHARIDE GUM-4 ; CELLULOSE ; HYDROXYETHYL ACRYLATE/SODIUM ACRYLOYLDIMETHYL TAURATE COPOLYMER ; POLYSORBATE 60 ; SORBITAN ISOSTEARATE ; MALTODEXTRIN ; PARFUM (FRAGRANCE) ; ETHYLHEXYLGLYCERIN ; LINALOOL ; LIMONENE ; CITRONELLOL ; GERANIOL.
products.description_en:
# A breath of fresh air and purity for your skin ✨



A true daily shield, this gel-cream is the ultimate ally for urban skin. Its ultra-light, non-greasy texture creates an invisible protective film that limits the adhesion of pollution particles. Enriched with Almond Blossom and Moringa extracts, it intensely hydrates while helping the skin rid itself of accumulated impurities. Your complexion stays fresh, and your skin feels soft and perfectly protected.



**Why you'll love it:**

* **Anti-Pollution Action:** Actively protects against external aggressions and fine particles.

* **Featherlight Texture:** An immediate fresh finish with no sticky feel.

* **Natural Purity:** 97% natural origin, dye-free, and silicone-free for total skin respect.



💡 **Expert Tip:** If you live in a highly polluted environment, make sure to massage the product until fully absorbed. This helps seal the Moringa protective barrier for maximum effectiveness against dust particles all day long.
products.usageTips_en: Apply in the morning to a clean, dry face. Massage gently in circular motions until fully absorbed. Its immediate freshness instantly wakes up your complexion.

products.description_en:
# Instant Plumping & High-Shine Finish

Elevate your pout with the Nour Beauty® Magic Lipgloss Filler. Designed to deliver an instant volumizing effect, this innovative gloss acts as an optical "filler" to smooth out lip lines and enhance your natural lip shape. Its translucent, warm apricot-tinted formula glides on smoothly, wrapping your lips in a high-shine, lacquered shield. It is the ultimate go-to for a glamorous look, visibly fuller lips, and everyday comfort.

**Why you'll love it:**

* **Plumping Filler Effect:** Visibly boosts and defines lip volume for a plumper, juicier pout.
* **Mirror-Like Shine:** A sleek, high-gloss finish that perfectly catches and reflects light from every angle.
* **Smooth & Lightweight:** Non-sticky, comfortable gel texture that feels weightless on the lips.
* **Universal Warm Tint:** A translucent, warm tone that subtly enhances and complements all lip colors.
* **Unique Packaging:** Designed in a sleek, ampoule-inspired bottle that brings a clinical, high-end feel to your makeup routine.

> **Beauty Tip:** Wear it alone on bare lips for a naturally enhanced, high-shine daily look. Alternatively, dab it onto the center of your lips over your favorite Lip Teint to create a gorgeous multi-dimensional gradient look.

**Key Features:**
* **Line:** Magic Filler.
* **Finish:** High-Shine / Wet-Lip Look.
products.description:
Un gloss repulpant pour des lèvres brillantes, lissées et plus pulpeuses.

Sa texture glisse facilement sur les lèvres et apporte un fini miroir très lumineux. L'effet filler donne visuellement plus de volume, tout en gardant une sensation confortable.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Brillance intense effet laqué.
- Aide à lisser les ridules des lèvres.
- Effet volume immédiat.
- Teinte translucide facile à porter seule ou sur un rouge à lèvres.

**Astuce :** applique-le au centre des lèvres pour accentuer l'effet rebondi.
products.title: Gloss Repulpant Magic Filler

products.description:
Un gommage corps pour retrouver une peau plus douce et plus lumineuse.

Sa poudre de noyaux d'olive exfolie en douceur et aide à éliminer les cellules mortes. La peau paraît plus lisse, plus nette et mieux préparée à recevoir un lait ou une huile hydratante.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Exfoliants 100% naturels.
- 98% d'ingrédients d'origine naturelle.
- Sans sulfate et sans silicone.
- Convient aux peaux normales à sèches.

**Astuce :** utilise-le une à deux fois par semaine, puis applique un soin hydratant juste après.

products.usageTips_en: Once or twice a week, apply to damp skin while showering. Massage the entire body with circular motions, then rinse thoroughly. Apply a moisturizing body lotion immediately after to lock in the softness.
products.description_en:
# Soft Skin & Natural Radiance 🌿

Rediscover the feel of smooth skin with this body scrub featuring 100% natural exfoliants. Its unique formula gently removes dead skin cells while respecting the balance of normal to dry skin types.

### Why it’s a game-changer:
* **Natural Exfoliation:** Formulated with olive seed powder for effective scrubbing that restores the skin's natural glow.
* **Skin-Friendly Formula:** Made with **98% ingredients of natural origin**, sulfate-free, and silicone-free for a gentle cleansing experience.
* **Instant Results:** From the first use, skin feels infinitely softer, smoother, and perfectly prepared for moisturizing.
* **Authentic Heritage:** Made in France using olive seeds from traditional Mediterranean mills.
products.composition: Aqua (Water), Decyl Glucoside, Prunus Armeniaca (Apricot) Seed Powder, Glycerin, Xanthan Gum, Olea Europaea (Olive) Seed Powder, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Benzoate, Citric Acid, Sodium Hydroxide.
products.usageTips: 1 à 2 fois par semaine, appliquez sur peau humide sous la douche. Massez avec des mouvements circulaires sur l'ensemble du corps, puis rincez abondamment. Appliquez un lait corps hydratant juste après pour sceller la douceur.

products.title: Gommage Corps Solide — Huile & Noyaux d'Olive
products.description:
Un gommage solide à l'huile et aux noyaux d'olive pour lisser la peau naturellement.

Il exfolie le corps en douceur tout en laissant une sensation de confort. La poudre de noyaux d'olive aide à retirer les cellules mortes, tandis que l'huile d'olive apporte un toucher plus nourri.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Format solide pratique.
- Exfoliation naturelle aux noyaux d'olive.
- Huile d'olive pour plus de douceur.
- Aide à révéler une peau plus lisse et lumineuse.

**Résultat :** la peau est plus douce, plus nette et agréable au toucher.
products.usageTips:
Sous la douche : Humidifiez votre corps et le galet.
Application : Massez directement le galet sur la peau en mouvements circulaires. Insistez sur les zones rugueuses (coudes, genoux, talons).
Rinçage : Rincez abondamment à l'eau tiède.
Fréquence : 1 à 2 fois par semaine maximum pour ne pas irriter l'épiderme.
products.usageTips_en:
In the shower: Wet your body and the scrub bar.
Application: Massage the bar directly onto the skin using circular motions. Focus on rough areas (elbows, knees, heels).
Rinsing: Rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water.
Frequency: 1 to 2 times per week maximum to avoid skin irritation.
products.description_en:
# The secret to naturally smooth skin 🌿

Rediscover your skin's radiance with the authenticity of Provence. **Le Petit Olivier Solid Body Scrub** is a natural gem that gently exfoliates your body. Its high-performance formula removes dead skin cells in a single step to reveal infinitely softer and more luminous skin.

**Why it stands out:**
* **100% Natural Exfoliation:** Uses genuine olive kernel powder for effective scrubbing that respects both your skin and the planet.
* **Olive Softness:** Enriched with olive oil to nourish the skin during exfoliation and prevent any discomfort.
* **Pure Commitment:** 98% natural origin ingredients, no added dyes, and One Voice certified for animal welfare.

💡 **Expert Tip:** In the shower, rub the bar directly onto damp skin in circular motions, focusing on rough areas like elbows, knees, and heels. Its solid format is also travel-friendly: no leaks in your suitcase and instant space-saving!
products.title_en: Solid Body Scrub — Olive Oil & Kernels

products.description:
Un gommage corps ludique pour exfolier la peau avec douceur.

Sa texture bicolore aux cristaux de sucre retire les cellules mortes sans agresser. Au contact de l'eau, elle devient plus lactée et laisse la peau douce, lisse et fraîche.

- Texture colorée et sensorielle.
- Cristaux de sucre pour exfolier en douceur.
- Aide à affiner le grain de peau.
- Laisse la peau plus douce après rinçage.

Discover the **Pharmamil Magic Scrub**, more than just an exfoliant; it is a true sensory experience. This vibrant two-tone scrub (refreshing blue and sparkling pink) gently removes dead cells thanks to its melting sugar crystals. Its unique texture transforms into a milky emulsion upon contact with water to instantly hydrate the skin. Result: a refined skin texture, incredibly soft skin, and a radiant complexion.

**Why you'll love it:**

* **Gentle Sugar Exfoliation:** Sugar crystals exfoliate without irritating, leaving the skin smooth.
* **Milky Hydration:** Transforms into a milk during rinsing for a soft and nourished finish.
* **Fresh Sensation:** Leaves a delightful feeling of freshness on the skin.

💡 **Expert Tip:** Apply to wet skin for a gentler exfoliation, or to dry skin for a more intense scrub on rough areas. Rinse thoroughly and admire the glow!
products.usageTips_en: Take a small amount and massage in circular motions on wet or dry skin. Rinse with water. Use 1 to 2 times a week.
products.usageTips: Prélevez une petite quantité et massez circulairement sur peau humide ou sèche. Rincez à l'eau. Utilisez 1 à 2 fois par semaine.
Appliquez sur peau mouillée par mouvements de massage circulaires, puis rincez à l'eau. Pour un résultat optimal, utilisez le gommage 1 à 2 fois par semaine.
products.title_en: Foaming Body Scrub - Dream in Hong Kong
products.composition: Aqua, Cetearyl Alcohol (and) Ceteareth-20, Cetyl Alcohol, Glycerin, Xanthan Gum, Butyrospermum Parkii Butter, Persea Gratissima Oil, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis Oil, Polysorbate, Phenoxyethanol, Sucrose, Charcoal Powder, Melaleuca Alternifolia Leaf Oil.

# Awaken your skin with a sensory escape to Hong Kong ✨

**MAKE Cosmetic Foaming Body Scrub** is more than just an exfoliant; it is a complete revitalizing treatment for the body. Its unique formula with natural sugar and active charcoal gently removes impurities and dead cells while stimulating cellular renewal. Thanks to its high concentration of plant-based oils (Sweet Almond, Avocado, Shea), it intensely hydrates your skin during exfoliation. The result: incredibly smooth, clean, and delicately scented skin.

**Why you'll love it:**
* **Natural Exfoliation:** Sugar melts away to refine skin texture without irritation.
* **Charcoal Detox:** Deeply purifies and releases toxins from the pores.

💡 **Expert Tip:** This scrub is perfect for preparing your skin before shaving or applying self-tanner. Focus on rough areas like elbows and knees for maximum smoothness.

Un gommage moussant pour nettoyer, exfolier et adoucir le corps en un seul geste.

Sa formule au sucre naturel et au charbon actif aide à retirer les impuretés et les cellules mortes. Les huiles végétales apportent du confort pour laisser la peau lisse et délicatement parfumée.

- Exfolie tout en moussant.
- Sucre naturel pour lisser la peau.

products.description_en:
The South’s natural radiance for your face ☀️
Treat your skin to a moment of pure softness with Le Petit Olivier Face Scrub. Specifically designed for normal to dry skin, it brings the authentic essence of Provence directly to your skincare routine.

The secret? Finely ground olive stone powder that gently cleanses your skin. In just one step, it removes dead skin cells and impurities to refine your skin texture. The result: your face regains its softness, suppleness, and a naturally radiant complexion.

Why we love it:

Its purity: Made with 98% natural origin ingredients, it respects your skin's natural balance. The formula is guaranteed sulfate-free and contains no animal-derived ingredients.

Its ethics: A skincare product made in France, concentrating all the Provençal expertise into one tube.

It’s that little "sun-kissed" gesture to add to your routine for smooth, glowing skin—just like after a stroll in the South of France! 🍃

Sa poudre de noyaux d'olive exfolie délicatement les cellules mortes et les impuretés. Le grain de peau paraît plus fin, le visage plus doux et le teint plus lumineux.

3. Rincez abondamment à l'eau tiède.
4. Utilisez 1 à 2 fois par semaine pour un résultat optimal.

# A radiant complexion and refined skin texture ✨

Polycos Paris Velvet Peach Face Scrub is an exfoliating treatment designed to restore radiance to your face while smoothing the skin's texture. Its unique formula contains natural exfoliating particles from apricot kernels that gently remove impurities and dead cells. Enriched with glycerin, this scrub hydrates and protects the epidermis, leaving your skin incredibly soft, like velvet.

**Why you'll love it:**
* **Instant Glow:** Unclogs pores and revives the complexion for an immediate illuminating effect.
* **Natural Exfoliation:** Features apricot kernel powder for an effective yet gentle scrub.
* **Softness & Protection:** Glycerin ensures skin remains nourished and protected during exfoliation.

💡 **Expert tip:** For maximum effectiveness without irritating the skin, use very light circular motions with your fingertips. Do not scrub hard; let the natural particles do the work for you.

1. Apply to damp face.
2. Use light circular motions, avoiding the eye area.
3. Rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water.
4. Use 1 to 2 times per week for best results.
products.composition: EAU, KAOLIN, GLYCÉRINE, ALCOOL CÉTÉARYLIQUE, PIERRE PONCE, TRIGLYCÉRIDE CAPRYLIQUE/CAPRIQUE, CÉTÉARETH-33, EXTRAIT DE PÊCHE, POUDRE DE NOYAUX D'ABRICOT, ACIDE CITRIQUE, PARFUM, PENTYLÈNE GLYCOL, BENZOATE DE SODIUM, CHLORPHÉNÉSINE, SORBATE DE POTASSIUM, CI 19140, CI 14700.
products.title: Gommage Visage Velours Pêche Illuminant

Un gommage visage à la pêche pour une peau plus douce et un teint plus lumineux.

Ses particules exfoliantes naturelles issues de noyaux d'abricot aident à retirer les cellules mortes et les impuretés. La glycérine apporte du confort pour éviter la sensation de peau rêche.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Aide à raviver l'éclat du teint.
- Exfoliation naturelle aux noyaux d'abricot.
