products.title: Hair Mayonnaise
products.description:
Un masque riche pour renforcer les cheveux faibles, cassants ou abîmés.

Hair Mayonnaise agit comme un soin profond pour aider à réparer la fibre capillaire et redonner de la force aux longueurs. Sa formule associe protéines d'oeuf, vitamines, huile d'olive et extraits botaniques pour nourrir les cheveux en profondeur.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Aide à fortifier les cheveux fragilisés.
- Apporte nutrition et hydratation aux longueurs.
- Contient protéines d'oeuf et huile d'olive.
- Idéal après colorations, chaleur ou traitements répétés.

**Astuce :** laisse poser quelques minutes sous une serviette chaude pour un soin plus intense.
products.usageTips:
1. Après le shampooing, massez une quantité généreuse de crème sur toute la chevelure, des racines jusqu'aux pointes.
2. Pour un soin optimal, couvrez les cheveux avec une charlotte en plastique ou enveloppez-les dans une serviette chaude pendant 10 minutes.
3. Rincez abondamment à l'eau tiède et coiffez comme d'habitude.
products.usageTips_en:
1. After shampooing, massage a generous amount of Hair Mayonnaise evenly into hair from roots to ends.
2. For extra conditioning, cover hair with a plastic cap or wrap hair with a warm towel for 10 minutes.
3. Rinse hair thoroughly with warm water and style as desired.
products.description_en:
# Deep conditioning treatment for weak, damaged hair

Organics by Africa's Best Hair Mayonnaise is enriched with Natural Botanical Herbal Extracts, Vitamins, Egg Protein, and Olive Oil to condition, moisturize, and strengthen damaged or over-processed hair. It provides a higher level of conditioning to help restore health and shine to your hair.

**Why you'll love it:**
* **Strength & Repair:** Specially designed for weak and fragile hair strands.
* **Natural Ingredients:** Infused with Extra Virgin Olive Oil, natural herbs, and egg protein.
* **Deep Moisture:** Delivers intense hydration to dry and brittle hair.
* **Clean Formula:** Contains no Petrolatum.
products.composition: Aqua (Water), Glycerin, Paraffinum Liquidum (Mineral Oil), Dicetyldimonium Chloride, Polyquaternium-32, Lanolin Oil, Behentrimonium Methosulfate, Olea Europaea Fruit Oil (Olive), Cetyl Alcohol, DMDM Hydantoin, Cetearyl Alcohol, Phenyl Trimethicone, Fragrance, Dimethicone, PEG-8 Laurate, Origanum Vulgare Leaf (Oregano), Daucus Carota Sativa Seed Oil (Carrot), Cholesterol, Soluble Collagen, Tocopherol, Ovum, Egg (Egg Powder), Panthenol, Carthamus Tinctorius (Safflower) Seed Oil, Ci 19140 (Yellow 5), Cl 42090 (Blue 1), Ci 16035 (Red 40), Rosmarinus Officinalis Leaf Extract (Rosemary), Equisetum Hyemale Extract (Horsetail), Urtica Dioica Extract (Nettle)

products.description:

Sa texture fluide laisse un fini satiné et aide à obtenir un bronzage plus lumineux. La formule associe bêta-carotène, beurre de cacao et vitamine E pour garder la peau souple pendant l'exposition.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**

# For an intense, long-lasting, and radiant tan ☀️

Celenes by Sweden Bronzing Oil encourages a deep, golden tan while keeping your skin protected. Enriched with natural herbal extracts and Vitamin E, this formula provides essential moisture and helps prevent sun-induced skin aging.

**Why you'll love it:**

products.description_en:
# Perfect makeup removal in one simple step ✨

Stop choosing between efficiency and gentleness. This melting cleansing oil instantly dissolves all types of makeup, even the most stubborn waterproof products, without the need for scrubbing. Its expert formula removes impurities accumulated throughout the day while respecting your skin's natural balance. The result: a perfectly clean, soothed, and incredibly soft face with no greasy residue.

**Why you'll love it:**
* **Waterproof Power:** Effortlessly removes long-wear mascaras and lipsticks.
* **Total Respect:** Anti-irritation, fragrance-free formula—ideal for sensitive face and eyes.
* **Silky Finish:** 98% natural origin ingredients for nourished and supple skin after rinsing.

💡 **Expert Tip:** Always apply the oil to dry skin with dry hands! Gently massage for 30 seconds to fully dissolve the makeup, then add a little lukewarm water to emulsify the oil into a milky texture before rinsing. This is the secret to deep cleansing without any residue.

products.title: Lash Sensational Sky High Waterproof
products.description_en:
# Sensational, limitless volume that resists absolutely everything! 👁️✨

**Maybelline Lash Sensational Sky High Waterproof** mascara takes your lashes to new heights from every single angle! Its innovative formula, enriched with bamboo extract and fibers, delivers intense volume and limitless length without ever weighing your lashes down. Featuring the exclusive *Flex Tower* brush, it bends to volumize and extend every single lash from root to tip for full impact. The waterproof formula ensures a flawless look all day long, completely smudge-proof and flake-free.

**Why you will love it:**
* **Sky-High Length & Volume:** Delivers full volume and boundless length for a high-impact, dramatic look.
* **Flex Tower Brush:** A unique, flexible brush that matches the natural curve of your lashes to separate without clumping.
* **Long-Lasting Waterproof Formula:** Waterproof, sweat-proof, and tear-proof to ensure your makeup stays perfect from morning to night.
* **Enriched with Bamboo:** Infused with bamboo extract to keep lashes feeling lightweight, supple, and healthy.

💡 **Expert Tip:** To get the ultimate lengthening effect, hold the flexible brush against your roots and sweep from root to tip using a slight zigzag motion. Since this is an ultra-resistant waterproof formula, make sure to use a bi-phase oil-based makeup remover to gently dissolve the mascara without rubbing or damaging your lashes.

# Nour Beauty Lip Teint — Hydrating Lip Stain & Weightless Color

Give your lips vibrant color and continuous hydration with the Nour Beauty® Lip Teint. This innovative lip stain instantly melts into the skin to enhance your natural lip color with an ultra-fresh, "bitten-lip" effect. Its lightweight, transfer-proof formula is enriched with advanced moisturizing properties ("Hydration & Moisture") to deliver rich color without ever drying out. Highly buildable, it effortlessly transitions from a subtle flush to a bold, long-lasting pout.

**Why you'll love it:**

* **Hydration & Moisture:** A unique formula that keeps lips soft, supple, and plump all day long.
* **Second-Skin Feel:** An ultra-lightweight, fluid texture that absorbs instantly without any sticky or heavy residue.
* **Long-Wear Stain:** Infuses lips with a long-lasting tint that is completely smudge-proof and kiss-proof.
* **Buildable Intensity:** Apply a single layer for a natural day-look, or layer up for a more sophisticated, bold statement.
* **Precision Applicator:** Perfectly glides on to define contours or blend seamlessly from the center of your lips.

> **Beauty Tip:** For a trendy gradient look, apply a small dot of the tint to the center of your lips and blend outwards with your fingertip. For an extra juicy, plumped finish, layer a clear gloss on top once set.

**Available Shades:**
* **Dark Plum / Black Cherry (06):** A deep, mysterious burgundy for a sophisticated, bold look.
* **Poppy Red (02):** A bright, luminous red to instantly wake up and brighten your complexion.

**Why you'll love it:**

products.description:
Une lotion tonique anti-âge pour finaliser le nettoyage et préparer la peau aux soins.

Elle aide à retirer les dernières impuretés tout en apportant une sensation de fraîcheur. L'acide hyaluronique et la niacinamide soutiennent l'hydratation et l'éclat du teint.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Parfait le démaquillage.
- Prépare la peau avant sérum ou crème.
- Acide hyaluronique pour l'hydratation.
- Niacinamide pour un teint plus uniforme.

**Astuce :** applique avec un coton ou directement dans les mains, puis continue avec ton soin hydratant.

products.description_en:
# Nour Beauty Luxury Lip Gloss — High-Shine Mirror Finish & Plumping Effect

Elevate your smile with a multidimensional glow using the Nour Beauty® Luxury Lip Gloss. This high-shimmer formula catches and reflects light to deliver an instant volumizing effect and visually plumper lips. Its ultra-comfortable gel texture glides on smoothly without any sticky feel, while the fine micro-shimmers offer a sophisticated sparkle. Perfect to wear alone for a fresh, everyday look, or layered over your favorite lip stain for a glamorous finish.

**Why you'll love it:**

* **Extreme Mirror Shine:** A high-gloss finish that catches light from every angle for a juicy, wet-lip look.
* **Non-Sticky Formula:** A lightweight, comfortable texture that provides maximum shine without any tacky residue.
* **Optical Plumping Effect:** Shimmering particles create an illusion of dimension for fuller-looking lips.
* **Hydration & Comfort:** Keeps lips feeling soft, smooth, and perfectly conditioned throughout the day.
* **Adorable Design:** An elegant, uniquely structured bottle with a pleated dome cap that adds a lovely, premium touch to your collection.

> **Beauty Tip:** For a trendy "Glowy Bitten-Lip" look, apply a small amount of your Lip Teint to the center of your lips, blend it out, and coat the entire lips with this gloss to lock in the color under a sparkling, lacquered shine.

**Available Shades:**
* **Crystal Sparkle:** A crystal-clear base infused with silver and white micro-glitters for a frosty, luminous finish.
* **Peach Glow:** A soft, subtly shimmering peach/pink tint to naturally warm up and enhance your natural lip color.
products.description:
Un gloss brillant pour donner aux lèvres un effet lumineux et repulpé.

Sa texture gel glisse facilement, apporte une brillance miroir et reste confortable. Les micro-nacres captent la lumière pour donner plus de dimension aux lèvres.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Brillance intense effet miroir.
- Fini scintillant sophistiqué.
- Sensation confortable, sans effet trop collant.
- Peut se porter seul ou sur une encre à lèvres.

**Astuce :** ajoute une touche au centre des lèvres pour un effet volume plus visible.
products.title: Luxury Lip Gloss

products.description_en:
# A lash-by-lash volume explosion for a stunning look! 🎆✨

**Nour Beauty Firework** mascara creates a true shockwave for your lashes! Designed to deliver a spectacular 360° volume, it perfectly fans out and defines every single lash like a visual firework display. Its innovative custom brush is engineered to grab even the shortest lashes from root to tip, charging them with an ultra-black, lightweight formula. The buildable texture leaves absolutely no clumps and lasts all day for a captivating and beautifully defined gaze.

**Why you will love it:**
* **360° Explosive Volume:** Maximum fan-out and lash-by-lash definition for a dramatic, widespread look.
* **Perfect Separation:** Separates and coats every individual lash smoothly without clumping.
* **Comfort & Long-Lasting Wear:** Stays flawless and lightweight all day without flaking or weighing down your lashes.
* **Generous Size:** A **8 ml** tube perfect for your daily makeup routine.

💡 **Expert Tip:** For an even more intense effect, place the brush at the base of your lashes and use slight upward rotating motions. Feel free to layer a second coat to amplify the "firework" effect; the advanced formula remains fluid and flexible without making your lashes feel stiff.
products.title: Mascara Firework
products.description:
Un mascara volume pour un regard plus ouvert et des cils bien séparés.

Sa brosse attrape même les petits cils et les déploie de la racine à la pointe. La formule noire donne de l'intensité sans faire de paquets.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Volume visible à 360°.
- Sépare les cils pour un rendu propre.
- Noir intense.
- Texture légère qui ne surcharge pas.

**Résultat :** les cils paraissent plus fournis, plus définis et le regard plus réveillé.

Un mascara waterproof pour donner du volume et définir les cils sans effort.

Sa brosse Max Volume attrape les cils, même les plus courts, pour les étoffer et les séparer. La formule tient bien dans la journée et résiste à l'humidité.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Volume intense dès l'application.
- Aide à allonger et séparer les cils.
- Effet éventail plus ouvert.
- Formule waterproof.

**Astuce :** applique une première couche pour définir, puis une deuxième avant séchage pour plus de volume.
products.title: Mascara Waterproof Elegance
products.description_en:
# Dramatic Volume & Luxurious Lashes

Mariabeauty Elegance Mascara is designed to transform your look in a single stroke. Its high-performance formula coats every lash to provide maximum volume and perfect definition. Equipped with an innovative "Max Volume" brush, it captures even the shortest lashes for a luxurious fan effect and flawless wear all day long.

**Why you'll love it:**

* **Intense Volume:** Features a "Max Volume Brush" for thicker, fuller-looking lashes.
* **Luxurious Lashes:** A formula that lengthens and separates lashes for a sophisticated gaze.
* **Optimal Resistance:** Waterproof formula that resists humidity and stays smudge-free.
* **Deep Black:** Intense pigmentation to elegantly define and highlight your eyes.
* **Prestige Design:** Comes in a stunning gold packaging, reflecting its premium quality.
products.usageTips_en:
1. Position the brush at the base of your upper lashes.
2. Sweep the brush upwards to the tips using a slight zigzag motion to separate each lash.
3. Apply a second coat for even more dramatic volume.
4. For lower lashes, use the tip of the brush for precise application.
products.usageTips:
1. Placez la brosse à la base des cils supérieurs.
2. Étirez la matière jusqu'aux pointes en effectuant de légers mouvements de zigzag pour bien séparer les cils.
3. Appliquez une seconde couche pour un volume encore plus dramatique.
4. Pour les cils inférieurs, utilisez la pointe de la brosse pour une application précise.

products.title: Masque d'Argile Verte au Curcuma
products.description:
Un masque à l'argile verte et au curcuma pour purifier les peaux à imperfections.

L'argile verte aide à absorber l'excès de sébum et à désincruster les pores. Le curcuma apporte de l'éclat, tandis que la vitamine E aide à garder une peau plus confortable.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Aide à réduire l'apparence des imperfections.
- Purifie les pores et les points noirs.
- Effet matifiant sur les zones brillantes.
- Formule avec boue de la mer Morte, curcuma et vitamine E.

**Astuce :** ne le laisse pas sécher complètement sur la peau, puis rince à l'eau tiède.
products.usageTips:
1. Appliquez une couche uniforme sur le visage propre.
2. Laissez agir pendant 15 à 20 minutes.
3. Rincez abondamment à l'eau tiède.
4. Utilisez idéalement 3 fois par semaine pour des résultats visibles.
products.composition: MARIS LIMUS (BOUE DE LA MER MORTE), EAU, BENTONITE, EXTRAIT DE CURCUMA, PHÉNOXYÉTHANOL, TOCOPHÉROL (VITAMINE E), ÉTHYLHEXYLGLYCÉRINE.
products.usageTips_en:
1. Apply an even layer to a clean face.
2. Leave on for 15 to 20 minutes.
3. Rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water.
4. Ideally, use 3 times a week for visible results.
products.description_en:
# For clear, matte, and blemish-free skin

The ABUSAAD Green Clay Mask with Turmeric is a comprehensive purifying treatment designed for blemish-prone skin. By combining the absorbent properties of green clay with the benefits of turmeric, this mask works deeply to cleanse the skin while restoring radiance to the complexion.

**Why you'll love it:**
* **Anti-Acne Action:** Helps effectively fight against acne and blemishes.
* **Deep Purification:** Removes blackheads and unclogs pores.
* **Matte Finish:** Regulates excess oil for clean, shine-free skin.
* **Enriched Formula:** Contains Dead Sea mud, turmeric, and Vitamin E to protect and revitalize the skin.

💡 **Expert tip:** For best results, apply a moisturizer immediately after rinsing off the mask to seal in hydration and soothe the skin.

# Plant-based strength for transformed hair 🍇

Treat your hair to an intense strengthening cure. This sulfate-free **Professional Mask** harnesses the exceptional benefits of **plant-based Tannins**. Designed for hair lacking vitality, it deeply hydrates the fiber while restoring the structure and suppleness needed for natural, fluid movement.

**Why it’s a must-have:**
* **Plant-Based Fortification:** Tannins strengthen the hair's internal structure, perfect for adding body to weakened hair.
* **Hydration & Suppleness:** Infuses necessary moisture without weighing it down, leaving hair feeling weightless and soft to the touch.
* **Deep Radiance:** Smoothes the hair surface to capture light and provide a long-lasting brilliant shine.

💡 **Expert Tip:** For fine hair, only apply the mask to the lengths and ends (starting from ear-level). This treats the driest areas while maintaining maximum volume at the roots. Leave on for 5 minutes for optimal absorption of the active ingredients.
products.usageTips_en: After washing your hair, gently squeeze out excess water. Apply to the lengths and ends. Leave on for a few minutes, then rinse thoroughly.
products.composition: Aqua, Myristyl Alcohol, Cetyl Alcohol, Cetrimonium Chloride, Benzyl Alcohol, Stearamidopropyl Dimethylamine, Citric Acid, Disodium Edta, Parfum, Benzoic Acid, Ethoxydiglycol, Peg-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Dehydroacetic Acid, Hydrolyzed Keratin, Lactobacillus Ferment, Tannic Acid, Tocopherol.
products.usageTips: Après avoir lavé vos cheveux, essorez-les délicatement. Appliquez sur la longueur et les pointes. Laissez poser puis rincer abondamment.
products.description:
Un masque professionnel pour renforcer les cheveux en manque de vitalité.

Sa formule à la kératine et aux tanins d'origine végétale aide à fortifier la fibre capillaire. Elle apporte hydratation, souplesse et un toucher plus doux sans alourdir les cheveux.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Tanins végétaux pour aider à renforcer la fibre.
- Kératine pour soutenir la structure du cheveu.
- Apporte souplesse et mouvement.
- Formule sans sulfate.

**Pour qui :** idéal si tes cheveux sont affaiblis, ternes ou difficiles à coiffer.
products.title: Masque Kératine & Extrait de Vin (Tanin)

products.composition: Aqua, Myristyl Alcohol, Cetyl Alcohol, Cetrimonium Chloride, Benzyl Alcohol, Stearamidopropyl Dimethylamine, Parfum, Citric Acid, Disodium Edta, Benzoic Acid, Dehydroacetic Acid, Propylene Glycol, Tocopherol, Linalool, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Extract, Lecithin, Hexamethylindanopyran, Limonene, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Dimethyl Phenethyl Acetate, Citrus Limon Peel Oil, Achillea Millefolium Flower Extract, Panax Ginseng Root Extract, Arctostaphylos Uva Ursi Leaf Extract, Punica Granatum Pericarp Extract.
products.description_en:
# A radiance boost for your highlights 🎨

Give your color a second life. This **Professional Mask** is a deep treatment designed to nourish the hair fiber while reviving the radiance of color-treated and highlighted hair. Its sulfate-free and paraben-free formula penetrates deep into the hair to lock in light and prolong the intensity of your shade.

**Why it’s a must-have:**
* **Intense Nutrition:** Provides essential nutrients to repair hair weakened by successive coloring treatments.
* **Color Reviver:** The combined action of pomegranate and grape seed wakes up dull highlights and boosts shine.
* **High-Fidelity Softness:** Leaves hair incredibly silky, making detangling easy without weighing the hair down.

💡 **Expert Tip:** After shampooing, apply a dollop of mask to towel-dried lengths. Leave on for 5 to 10 minutes to allow the active ingredients to nourish the fiber. For an immediate "glow" effect, finish your rinse with a splash of cold water to seal the cuticles.
products.usageTips_en: After washing your hair, gently squeeze out excess water and apply to the lengths and ends. Leave on for a few minutes, then rinse.
products.usageTips: Après avoir lavé vos cheveux, essorez-les délicatement et appliquez sur les longueurs et pointes. Laissez poser puis rincer.
products.description:
Un masque professionnel pour nourrir les cheveux colorés ou méchés.

Sa formule à la kératine, aux pépins de raisin et à la grenade aide à raviver la brillance et à garder une couleur plus lumineuse. Les longueurs sont plus douces, plus souples et plus faciles à démêler.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Aide à nourrir les cheveux fragilisés par la coloration.
- Ravive les reflets ternes.
- Apporte brillance et douceur.
- Sans sulfate ni parabène.

**Astuce :** utilise-le une fois par semaine pour entretenir l'éclat de la couleur.
products.title: Masque Kératine, Pépins de Raisin & Grenade

products.usageTips: Après avoir lavé vos cheveux avec le shampooing, essorez-les délicatement et appliquez le masque sur la longueur et les pointes. Laissez poser 5 à 10 minutes puis rincez abondamment.
products.composition: Aqua, Myristyl Alcohol, Cetyl Alcohol, Cetrimonium Chloride, Benzyl Alcohol, Stearamidopropyl Dimethylamine, Parfum, Citric Acid, Disodium Edta, Benzoic Acid, Dehydroacetic Acid, Benzyl Benzoate, Ricinus Communis Seed Oil, Hydrolyzed Keratin, Lactobacillus Ferment.
products.description_en:
# A silken armor for your hair 💎

Experience salon-quality results at home. This intense mask combines the strength of **Keratin** with the richness of **Castor Oil** for a visible transformation. Its sulfate-free formula wraps every fiber to seal the cuticles and restore a mirror-like shine to your hair.

**The secret of a professional treatment:**
* **Intense Reconstruction:** Keratin fills in the gaps in the hair fiber to strengthen fragile hair from within.
* **Growth & Strength:** The nourishing action of castor oil fortifies the ends and actively helps reinforce hair cuticles.
* **Mirror Shine:** By perfectly smoothing the hair surface, this mask allows for optimal light reflection for exceptional shine.

💡 **Expert Tip:** For best results, towel-dry your hair thoroughly before applying. Apply the mask strand by strand on the lengths and ends, then wrap your hair in a warm towel for 10 minutes. The heat will help the keratin penetrate deep into the hair fiber.
products.usageTips_en: After washing your hair with shampoo, gently towel-dry it and apply the mask to the lengths and ends. Leave on for 5 to 10 minutes, then rinse thoroughly.
products.title: Masque Professionnel — Kératine & Huile de Ricin
products.description:
Un masque riche pour renforcer les cheveux abîmés et leur redonner de la brillance.

La kératine aide à lisser et renforcer la fibre, tandis que l'huile de ricin nourrit les longueurs. Les cheveux paraissent plus souples, plus brillants et mieux disciplinés.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Kératine pour aider à réparer les zones fragilisées.
- Huile de ricin pour nourrir et fortifier.
- Aide à lisser les frisottis.
- Formule sans sulfate.

**Résultat :** les cheveux sont plus doux, plus brillants et plus faciles à coiffer.

products.title: Masque Purifiant — Argile Verte Bio
products.description:
Un masque à l'argile verte bio pour purifier les peaux grasses.

Il aide à absorber l'excès de sébum, à réduire les brillances et à rendre la peau plus nette. Sa texture onctueuse s'applique facilement pour un soin rapide à la maison.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Argile verte purifiante.
- Aide à matifier la peau.
- Peut resserrer visuellement les pores.
- Certifié bio et sans parfum.

**Astuce :** garde le masque légèrement humide pendant la pose pour éviter de trop assécher la peau.
products.description_en:
# A breath of purity for your skin 🌿

Say goodbye to shine! The **Lovea Nature Bio** mask is a powerful concentrate of purifying **Green Clay**. Its creamy texture clears away impurities and absorbs excess sebum, leaving your skin clean, matte, and visibly healthier.

**What makes the difference:**
* **Organic & Pure Formula:** BIO certified and fragrance-free to respect the natural balance of oily skin.
* **Detox Action:** Green clay works deeply to tighten pores and refine skin texture.
* **Guaranteed Softness:** A quick and easy application for professional results at home.

💡 **Expert Tip:** Never let clay dry completely on your face (if it cracks, it's been on too long!). Clay is active only while it's damp. Mist a little water over it during the 5-minute wait to keep it active without dehydrating your skin.
products.composition: AQUA (WATER), ILLITE, KAOLIN, MONTMORILLONITE, GLYCERIN, BUTYROSPERMUM PARKII (SHEA) BUTTER EXTRACT*, CETEARYL GLUCOSIDE, CETEARYL ALCOHOL, CORYLUS AVELLANA (HAZEL) SEED OIL*, ALOE BARBADENSIS LEAF POWDER*, POLYEPSILON-LYSINE, BENZYL ALCOHOL, GLYCERYL CAPRYLATE, CAPRYLOYL GLYCINE, DEHYDROACETIC ACID, OLEYL ALCOHOL, SODIUM USNATE, ZANTHOXYLUM BUNGEANUM FRUIT EXTRACT.

products.description:
Un masque visage au charbon actif pour détoxifier et lisser la peau.

Le charbon actif aide à attirer les impuretés et l'excès de sébum. Il désincruste les pores et laisse la peau plus nette, plus fraîche et visiblement plus propre.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Charbon actif purifiant.
- Aide à nettoyer les pores en profondeur.
- Rend le grain de peau plus lisse.
- Idéal pour les peaux stressées ou sujettes aux impuretés.

**Résultat :** la peau paraît plus claire, plus propre et moins encombrée.
products.title: Masque Visage Détox au Charbon Actif
products.description_en:
# Deeply purified skin and refined pores in minutes ✨

Polycos Paris Detox Face Mask is the ultimate treatment to rid your skin of accumulated impurities. Formulated with activated charcoal, renowned for its exceptional absorbent and purifying properties, this luxurious black mask deeply unclogs pores. It helps restore smooth, clear, and visibly more radiant skin, acting as a true protective shield for stressed and tired complexions.

**Why you'll love it:**
* **Deep Detox Action:** Activated charcoal acts like a magnet to draw out toxins and impurities.
* **Refined Texture:** Effectively clears pores and smooths the skin's surface for a flawless finish.
* **Radiance Boost:** Instantly restores brightness to dull and fatigued skin types.

💡 **Expert tip:** Don't wait for the mask to completely dry and crack! Rinse it off while it's still slightly tacky to prevent over-drying your skin while still reaping all the purifying benefits.
products.usageTips_en:
1. Apply a thin layer to a thoroughly cleansed face.
2. Leave on for 3 to 5 minutes.
3. Rinse off with lukewarm water before the mask dries out completely.
4. Avoid the eye contour area.
products.composition: EAU, ALCOOL CÉTÉARYLIQUE, KAOLIN, GLYCÉRINE, HUILE DE GRAINES DE RICINUS COMMUNIS, CÉTÉARETH-33, ALCOOL BENZYLIQUE, PARFUM, GOMME XANTHANE, CI77499 (OXYDE DE FER), ACIDE LACTIQUE, ALLANTOÏNE, POUDRE DE CHARBON, TOCOPHÉROL, ACIDE DÉHYDROACÉTIQUE, HYDROXYDE DE SODIUM, LIMONENE, ALPHA-ISOMETHYL IONONE.
products.usageTips:
1. Sur une peau bien nettoyée, appliquez une fine couche sur le visage.
2. Laissez poser 3 à 5 minutes.
3. Rincez à l'eau tiède avant que le masque ne soit totalement sec.
4. Évitez le contour des yeux.

products.title: Masque Visage Nourrissant & Lissant
products.description:
Un masque nourrissant pour redonner du confort aux peaux très sèches.

Sa formule à l'huile d'argan, aux huiles précieuses, à la vitamine E et à la glycérine aide à adoucir la peau et à lisser son grain. La texture riche apporte une sensation de réconfort immédiat.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Nourrit les peaux sèches en profondeur.
- Huile d'argan pour plus de souplesse.
- Aide à lisser et adoucir la peau.
- Apporte un fini plus lumineux.

**Pour qui :** parfait si ta peau tiraille, manque de confort ou paraît terne.
products.usageTips: 1 à 2 fois par semaine, étalez sur le visage en évitant le contour des yeux. Laissez poser 3 minutes seulement pour une efficacité optimale, puis rincez abondamment à l'eau claire.
products.usageTips_en: 1 to 2 times a week, spread over the face, avoiding the eye area. Leave on for only 3 minutes for optimal results, then rinse thoroughly with clean water.
products.description_en:
# Treat your skin to a deep nourishing bath ✨

This mask is the ultimate solution for very dry skin seeking comfort. Its rich formula, combining Argan Oil and Precious Oils, works deeply to cleanse, gently exfoliate, and soften the skin. Its creamy texture provides instant relief, removes impurities, and restores your face's natural suppleness and glow.

**Why you'll love it:**
* **Intense Nutrition:** Argan deeply nourishes to repair even the driest skin.
* **Triple Action:** It cleanses, purifies, and smooths skin texture in one single step.
* **Radiance Booster:** Enriched with Vitamin E and Glycerin for a bright and revitalized complexion.

💡 **Expert Tip:** For maximum effectiveness, apply the mask right after showering when your pores are still dilated by the steam. This allows the precious oils to penetrate even deeper for instantly plumped skin after rinsing.
products.composition: AQUA (WATER) ; ARGAN OIL ; KAOLIN ; BENTONITE ; PROPANEDIOL ; GLYCERIN ; CI 77891 (TITANIUM DIOXIDE) ; CAPRYLIC/CAPRIC TRIGLYCERIDE ; CETEARYL ALCOHOL ; ZEA MAYS (CORN) STARCH ; PHENOXYETHANOL ; CETEARETH-20 ; CAPRYLYL GLYCOL ; XANTHAN GUM ; ETHYLHEXYLGLYCERIN ; TOCOPHEROL ; LECITHIN ; ALOE BARBADENSIS LEAF JUICE ; AVENA SATIVA FLOUR ; KERNEL FLOUR ; ALLANTOIN.

products.usageTips_en:
1. Apply a thin layer to a thoroughly cleansed face.
2. Leave on for 3 to 5 minutes.
3. Rinse off with lukewarm water before the mask dries completely to keep the skin well hydrated.
4. Avoid the eye contour area.
products.description_en:
# A nutritional treasure for radiant skin ✨

Polycos Paris Nourishing Face Mask is a true softness treatment for skin in search of comfort. Formulated with argan oil, a natural ingredient rich in antioxidants, it promotes skin elasticity and regeneration. This creamy mask intensely nourishes even the driest skin, acting as a protective shield to provide you with soft, supple, and luminous "baby skin."

**Why you'll love it:**
* **Intense Nutrition:** Argan oil penetrates deeply to revitalize and nourish the epidermis.
* **Radiance & Suppleness:** Helps restore light to the complexion while improving skin elasticity.
* **Absolute Comfort:** Immediately soothes tightness for a soft, baby-skin finish.

💡 **Expert tip:** For even softer skin, massage any excess product with your fingertips just before rinsing. This helps the final active ingredients of the argan oil penetrate for optimal results.
products.composition: EAU, ALCOOL CÉTÉARYLIQUE, KAOLIN, GLYCÉRINE, HUILE DE GRAINES DE RICINUS COMMUNIS, CÉTÉARETH-33, ALCOOL BENZYLIQUE, PARFUM, GOMME XANTHANE, HUILE D'ARGAN, ACIDE LACTIQUE, ALLANTOÏNE, ACIDE DÉHYDROACÉTIQUE, TOCOPHÉROL, CI 60730 (VIOLET ACID 43), HYDROXYDE DE SODIUM.
products.usageTips:
1. Sur une peau bien nettoyée, appliquez une fine couche sur le visage.
2. Laissez poser 3 à 5 minutes.
3. Rincez à l'eau tiède avant que le masque ne sèche complètement pour garder la peau bien hydratée.
4. Évitez le contour des yeux.
products.description:
Un masque nourrissant à l'huile d'argan pour redonner du confort aux peaux sèches.

Sa texture onctueuse nourrit la peau et aide à lui rendre souplesse et éclat. L'huile d'argan, riche en antioxydants, apporte une sensation de peau plus douce et mieux protégée.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Nourrit intensément les peaux sèches.
- Huile d'argan pour adoucir et assouplir.
- Aide à raviver l'éclat du teint.
- Texture riche et confortable.

**Résultat :** la peau paraît plus souple, plus lumineuse et plus douce au toucher.
products.title: Masque Visage Nourrissant à l'Huile d'Argan

products.composition: AQUA (WATER), GLYCERIN, DIMETHICONE, DIETHYLHEXYL CARBONATE, STEARIC ACID, PALMITIC ACID, PHENOXYETHANOL, STEARYL ALCOHOL, SILICA, SODIUM POLYACRYLATE STARCH, SODIUM POLYACRYLATE, HYDROLYZED MILK PROTEIN, UREA, SODIUM LACTATE, NIACINAMIDE, TOCOFERYL ACETATE, LACTIC ACID, CALCIUM LACTATE, LECITHIN, TOCOPHEROL, HELIANTHUS ANNUUS (SUNFLOWER) SEED OIL, PROPANEDIOL, CHLORPHENESIN, POTASSIUM SORBATE, SODIUM BENZOATE, SODIUM HYDROXIDE, PARFUM (FRAGRANCE), ALPHA-ISOMETHYL IONONE, BENZYL ALCOHOL, BENZYL SALICYLATE, CITRONELLOL, GERANIOL, LIMONENE, LINALOOL.
products.title_en: Lactourea Moisturizing Mousse Cream — Face & Body
products.usageTips_en: Apply daily to face and body. Massage gently until fully absorbed.
products.description_en:
# The power of a cream, the lightness of a mousse ☁️

Experience a new way to care for your skin with **Lactovit Lactourea Mousse Cream**. Its unique, airy texture melts instantly into the skin without leaving any greasy residue. Specially formulated with the *Lactourea* complex (Urea and Lactic Acid), it repairs, protects, and deeply hydrates dry to very dry skin for 24 hours.

**Key benefits:**
* **Intensive Hydration:** Repairs the skin barrier using the benefits of milk and urea.
* **Revolutionary Texture:** As nourishing as a traditional cream, yet light as air for immediate absorption.
* **All-in-One Care:** 2-in-1 formula suitable for both face and body.
* **Dermatological Expertise:** Recommended by 9 out of 10 dermatologists for its effectiveness on fragile skin.

💡 **Expert Tip:** This is the perfect product for busy people who want to get dressed immediately after application. Its ultra-fast absorption and matte finish leave the skin feeling soft and velvety in seconds.
products.usageTips: Appliquer quotidiennement sur le visage et le corps. Masser délicatement jusqu'à absorption complète.
products.description:
Une mousse-crème légère pour hydrater les peaux sèches à très sèches.

Sa texture aérienne fond vite sur la peau, sans laisser de film gras. Le complexe Lactourea, avec urée et acide lactique, aide à hydrater, réparer et protéger la barrière cutanée.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Hydratation jusqu'à 24h.
- Texture mousse légère et rapide à absorber.

# A unified and radiant complexion from the first use ✨

Bring back your skin's natural glow. This high-performance corrective treatment combines patented **Thiamidol** to reduce dark spots with **AHA** for a gentle exfoliating action. The result? Instantly more radiant skin and a refined texture.

**What makes the difference:**
* **Proven Results:** First visible reduction in dark spots starting from just 1 week of regular use.

* **High Tolerance:** Clinically tested on sensitive skin, suitable for all skin tones without irritation.

💡 **Expert Tip:** AHAs can make your skin more sensitive to the sun. To protect your results and prevent new spots from forming, always apply SPF 50 sun protection after using this treatment during the day.

WATER ; GLYCERIN ; STEARIC ACID ; MYRISTYL ALCOHOL ; LAURIC ACID ; PALMITIC ACID ; POTASSIUM HYDROXIDE ; SODIUM LAURYL SULFATE ; COCAMIDE MEA ; ETHYLENE GLYCOL DISTEARATE ; GLYCEROL STEARATE ; PEG-100 STEARATE ; HYDROXYPROPYLMETHYLCELLULOSE ; EDTA DISODIUM ; ALOE BARBADENSIS EXTRACT ; OLEA EUROPAEA EXTRACT ; GLYCEROL LAURATE ; PHENOXYETHANOL ; SALICYLIC ACID.
products.description_en:
# Transform your skin texture every day ✨



Say goodbye to uneven skin and rough patches. This dual-action cleansing cream deeply purifies while providing gentle exfoliation thanks to Salicylic Acid. It removes dead skin cells and smooths skin texture without being harsh. Enriched with Aloe Vera, it restores the skin barrier to leave your skin incredibly soft, supple, and clear.



**Why you'll love it:**

* **Immediate Smoothing:** Salicylic acid targets roughness for smoother skin from the very first use.

* **Soothing Hydration:** Aloe Vera balances the exfoliation to prevent any dryness.

* **High Tolerance:** Fragrance-free and paraben-free formula, perfect for sensitive or very dry skin.



💡 **Expert Tip:** Let the cream sit for 30 seconds before rinsing. This allows the salicylic acid to better dissolve dead cells for an even more visible "new skin" effect.

products.usageTips: Appliquez sur peau mouillée. Massez délicatement par mouvements circulaires en insistant sur les zones rugueuses, puis rincez abondamment à l'eau tiède.

Sa formule double action nettoie et aide à éliminer les cellules mortes grâce à l'acide salicylique. L'aloe vera apporte du confort pour garder une peau douce après rinçage.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Nettoie et exfolie en douceur.
- Acide salicylique pour aider à lisser les rugosités.
- Aloe vera pour apaiser et hydrater.
- Laisse la peau plus nette et plus souple.

**Pour qui :** idéal si ta peau manque de douceur ou présente des irrégularités.

# A cloud of softness for your daily routine ✨

Give your face the gentleness it deserves. **Le Petit Olivier Cleansing Foam** turns your cleansing ritual into a moment of pure comfort. Its creamy texture removes impurities while respecting the fragile balance of your skin.

* **Skin Barrier Protection:** Specifically designed to cleanse effectively while preventing skin dryness.

💡 **Expert Tip:** Foam cleansers are perfect for those who love water-based cleaning but fear that "tight skin" feeling. Apply one pump of foam, massage in circular motions on damp skin, then rinse with cool water to tone your face and tighten pores.

Un nettoyant purifiant au BHA pour les peaux sujettes aux boutons et points noirs.

products.usageTips_en: Apply twice daily to damp skin before your DERMOPURE CLINICAL skincare product. Suitable for both face and body. Can be used in combination with medical acne treatments. Avoid contact with eyes.
products.description_en:
# Targeted action against blemishes from day one 🎯

Say goodbye to **breakouts**, blackheads, and excess oil without irritating your face. This high-tolerance cleanser harnesses the power of **Salicylic Acid (BHA)** in an ultra-minimalist formula to sanitize inflamed areas and prevent new flare-ups.

**Why it will change your routine:**

* **Anti-Breakout Action:** Clinically proven effectiveness that begins reducing the appearance of pimples and redness from the very first day.
* **High-Safety Formula:** Only 8 essential ingredients. Soap-free, fragrance-free, and designed to respect even the most reactive skin, even during active acne flare-ups.
* **Purity & Balance:** It deeply purifies pores and mattifies the complexion without ever causing a feeling of tightness or dryness.

> **Did you know?** Unlike traditional cleansers that strip the skin, the DermoPure Clinical formula helps reduce breakouts while preserving the microbiome, preventing the "rebound effect" (where the skin produces even more oil to protect itself).

💡 **Expert Tip:** If you have a particularly inflamed pimple, do not pick at it. Leave the gel on the area for 60 seconds during cleansing: the Salicylic Acid will perform its gentle chemical exfoliation to help the breakout clear up faster.
products.usageTips: Appliquer deux fois par jour sur peau humide avant votre produit de soin DERMOPURE CLINICAL. Convient pour le visage et le corps. Peut être utilisé en complément d'un traitement médical contre l'acné. Éviter le contact avec les yeux.

1. Nettoyez parfaitement votre visage.
2. Appliquez la crème sur le visage et le cou.
3. Massez délicatement jusqu'à pénétration complète. S'utilise chaque matin.

💡 **Expert tip:** Apply your cream using circular motions starting from the center of the face and moving outwards. This stimulates micro-circulation and ensures better absorption of the protective ingredients.

2. Apply the cream to the face and neck.

1. Apply to clean, dry lips (use a lip scrub beforehand for an even smoother result).
2. Start by outlining the Cupid's bow, then sweep the color toward the outer corners.
3. Fill in the rest of the lips with a thin, even layer of product.
4. Allow a few seconds to dry without pressing your lips together to set the matte finish.

* **Velvety Matte Finish:** Provides a chic and modern look suitable for any occasion.
* **Precise Applicator:** Allows you to outline the lips sharply for a perfectly defined smile.

2. Commencez par dessiner l'arc de Cupidon, puis étirez la matière vers les coins extérieurs.
3. Remplissez le reste des lèvres avec une fine couche de produit.
4. Laissez sécher quelques secondes sans presser les lèvres l'une contre l'autre pour fixer le fini mat.

Un rouge à lèvres liquide pour une couleur intense au fini mat velouté.

💡 **Expert Tip:** Perfect for city dwellers and dull skin tones. This serum awakens the skin from the very first application, restoring its natural radiance and freshness.

# The final touch for sublimated hair ✨

Protect and magnify your hair fiber right down to the ends. This professional serum is a true shield of softness that instantly coats the hair. Thanks to the combined action of **Keratin** and **Castor Oil**, it strengthens fragile areas for thicker, softer, and incredibly shiny hair.

💡 **Expert Tip:** Warm 2 to 3 drops of serum between your hands, then distribute evenly through your **lengths and ends** only. Avoid the roots to maintain maximum volume. Use it on damp hair for easier detangling or on dry hair as a finishing touch to tame frizz.

Verser une noisette dans le creux de la main et appliquer sur cheveux humides ou secs. Sans rinçage.

- Lisse la surface du cheveu.

- Aide à réduire les frisottis.
- Protection thermique utile avant séchage.

**Astuce :** applique peu de produit avant le brushing pour garder du mouvement sans effet gras.

products.usageTips: Verser une noisette dans le creux de la main et appliquer sur cheveux humides ou secs. Sans rinçage.

products.description_en:
# The ultimate glow for color-treated hair ✨

Enhance and protect your hair color right down to the ends. This **Professional Keratin Serum** is a radiance concentrate specifically designed for highlighted and color-treated hair. Its lightweight texture coats the fiber to lock in pigments and provide brilliant shine while protecting your hair from external damage.

**Why it stands out:**
* **Radiance Fixer:** The antioxidant action of grape seed and pomegranate helps prevent color fading.
* **Silky Finish:** Instantly smoothes hair cuticles for a velvety touch and maximum light reflection.
* **Protection & Strength:** Keratin strengthens lengths weakened by chemical treatments to reduce breakage.

💡 **Expert Tip:** Apply one pump of serum to your hands, rub them together to warm the product, then smooth only through your **lengths and ends** after styling. This is the secret to eliminating frizz and achieving that "mirror" finish without ever weighing down your hairstyle.
products.usageTips_en: Pour a small amount (pea-sized) into the palm of your hand and apply to damp or dry hair. Leave-in (do not rinse).
products.title: Sérum Kératine, Pépins de Raisin & Grenade
products.description:
Un sérum capillaire pour protéger l'éclat des cheveux colorés ou méchés.

La kératine aide à renforcer la fibre, tandis que les pépins de raisin et la grenade apportent une action antioxydante. Les cheveux paraissent plus brillants, plus doux et mieux protégés.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Aide à préserver l'éclat de la couleur.
- Lisse les cuticules pour plus de brillance.
- Kératine pour renforcer les longueurs.
- Texture légère au fini soyeux.

**Pour qui :** parfait si tes cheveux colorés deviennent ternes ou secs sur les pointes.

Un sérum perfecteur pour lisser la peau, repulper les ridules et affiner le grain de peau.

Sa formule associe acide hyaluronique, Hyacare Filler et peptides pour cibler les premiers signes de l'âge. La texture légère pénètre vite et laisse la peau plus douce.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Repulpe les ridules.
- Aide à lisser le grain de peau.
- Peut améliorer l'apparence des pores.
- Texture légère, non grasse.

**Résultat :** la peau paraît plus lisse, plus fraîche et plus lumineuse.

products.composition: Aqua, butylene glycol, cellulose gum, microcrystalline cellulose, sodium hydroxide, pentylene glycol, lecithin, retinol, polysorbate 20, potassium phosphate, tocopherol, ascorbyl palmitate, BHT, BHA, tetra peptide-21, glycerin, butylene glycol, phenoxyethanol, ethylhexylglycerin.
products.usageTips_en: Apply once or twice daily to a clean face before your moisturizer. Use a cream with SPF during the day.
products.description_en:
# The secret to plumped and smoothed skin ✨

**Hyaluron-Filler Serum** is an advanced anti-aging concentrate designed to combat the first signs of aging. Its unique technology combines Hyaluronic Acid, Hyacare Filler, and Peptides for a triple-performance action. It plumps wrinkles, refines skin texture, and purifies pores for a silky and radiant finish. Its lightweight, non-greasy texture absorbs instantly for lasting antioxidant protection.

**Why you'll love it:**
* **Triple Action:** Plumps fine lines, smooths the skin, and tightens dilated pores.
* **Expert Formula:** Contains pure Hyaluronic Acid and Tetra Peptide-21 to boost skin's youthfulness.
* **Comfort Texture:** Penetrates quickly without leaving a sticky film.

💡 **Expert Tip:** This serum is ideal for rough or dull skin types looking to regain a smooth and purified appearance.
products.usageTips: Appliquez 1 à 2 fois par jour sur un visage parfaitement nettoyé avant votre soin hydratant. Utilisez une crème avec SPF pendant la journée.

products.description_en:
# Say goodbye to imperfections and enlarged pores ✨

**Pure Niacinamide 10% Serum** is the ultimate ally for all skin types seeking perfection. Its highly concentrated expert formula effectively regulates sebum and tightens pores for a visibly refined skin texture. Enriched with 2% Alpha-Arbutin and ceramides, it corrects dark spots while strengthening the skin barrier to prevent dehydration. The result: a unified complexion, soothed skin, and restored natural radiance. Its lightweight texture absorbs instantly without leaving a greasy film.

**Why you'll love it:**
* **Control & Balance:** Reduces shine and minimizes the appearance of pores without stripping the skin.
* **Dark Spot Correction:** Alpha-Arbutin helps fade post-blemish marks and hyperpigmentation.
* **Repair & Comfort:** Ceramides protect and restore the skin barrier for long-lasting comfort.
* **Universal Glow:** Revives dull skin for a fresh, clarified, and luminous finish.

💡 **Expert Tip:** While a favorite for combination skin due to its pore-refining action, this serum is suitable for **all skin types** thanks to its soothing and repairing properties. Apply morning and night to clean skin. If you have dry skin, always follow with your moisturizer to seal in hydration. 
**Caution:** Avoid using it in the same routine as pure Vitamin C (Ascorbic Acid) to maintain the efficacy of the active ingredients; use one in the morning and the other in the evening.
products.usageTips_en: Cleanse your skin. Apply 2 to 3 drops to the face and massage gently. Use morning and night. Always finish with SPF during the day.
products.composition: Aqua/Water, Butylene Glycol, Carbomer Homopolymer C, Acrylic Acid Polymer, Sodium Lactate, Sodium PCA, Glycine, Fructose, Urea, Niacinamide, Inositol, Sodium Benzoate, Lactic Acid, Glycerin, Aristotelia Chilensis Fruit Extract, Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin.

Sa formule concentrée à 10% de niacinamide aide à réduire la brillance et l'apparence des pores. L'alpha-arbutine cible les taches, tandis que les céramides soutiennent la barrière cutanée.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Aide à équilibrer l'excès de sébum.
- Réduit visuellement les pores dilatés.
- Alpha-arbutine pour un teint plus uniforme.
- Texture légère, sans film gras.

**Pour qui :** idéal si ta peau brille, marque facilement ou présente des taches pigmentaires.
products.title: Sérum Perfecteur Éclat (Niacinamide 10% & Arbutine)

products.description_en:
# Reactivate your skin's youth overnight ✨

**Zorah's Retinol Boost Serum** is a high-tech concentrate designed to transform your skin texture. Featuring **0.2% encapsulated retinol**, it penetrates deeply to stimulate collagen production while simultaneously treating wrinkles, acne, and dark spots. Combined with multi-peptides, this potent treatment refines skin grain and boosts firmness without irritation. A fragrance-free, non-comedogenic formula for a unified, radiant complexion upon waking.

**Why you'll love it:**
* **Multi-Correction Action:** Targets wrinkles, imperfections, and hyperpigmentation in one single step.
* **Encapsulated Retinol:** Slow release for maximum efficacy and improved skin tolerance.
* **Firmness Boost:** Multi-peptides and Vitamin E work in synergy for plumper, firmer skin.
* **Lightweight Texture:** Instant absorption with no greasy residue.

💡 **Expert Tip:** Retinol is a powerful active ingredient that can make skin photosensitive. Use it **exclusively in the evening**. If you are a beginner, start with 2 to 3 applications per week, then gradually increase. The following morning, applying SPF 50 sunscreen is **essential** to protect new cells and prevent dark spots.
products.usageTips: Dans la routine du soir, appliquez quelques gouttes sur l'ensemble du visage propre et sec. Tapotez jusqu'à absorption. Utilisez 2 à 4 nuits par semaine au début, puis augmentez selon la tolérance. Toujours appliquer un SPF le matin.

Sa formule au rétinol encapsulé 0,2% et aux peptides aide à améliorer la texture de la peau, les rides, les imperfections et les taches. Elle travaille surtout le soir, pour une peau plus régulière au réveil.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**

- Peptides pour soutenir la fermeté.

Its ultra-light texture quenches the skin's thirst without any greasy feel.

**Why you'll love it:**

* **Absolute Comfort:** Instantly soothes tightness caused by dryness.
* **Invisible Finish:** Absorbs quickly, leaving skin supple, fresh, and ready for your moisturizer.

**Expert Tip:** Think of this as a "hydrating shield" for your skin. Use it morning and night to hydrate without any shine or to soothe irritated skin. It is perfect for absolutely everyone, even the most sensitive skin types.

products.description_en:
# A hydration powerhouse for plumped skin ✨

Floré Perfect Skin Serum with Hyaluronic Acid and Vitamin B5 provides an intense treatment for a radiant complexion. Hyaluronic Acid, famous for holding up to 1000 times its weight in water, works deep within the skin to hydrate and re-plump the surface. This targeted formula visibly reduces the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, leaving your skin feeling supple, smooth, and revitalized.

**Why you'll love it:**
* **Deep Hydration:** Hyaluronic Acid infuses the skin with moisture for an immediate "plump" effect.
* **Restorative Action:** Vitamin B5 (Panthenol) helps soothe and strengthen the skin's moisture barrier.
* **Universal Formula:** A lightweight, fast-absorbing texture suitable for all skin types.

💡 **Expert tip:** Apply your serum to slightly damp skin (after toning or misting). The Hyaluronic Acid will grab onto that surface moisture and lock it into your skin, significantly boosting hydration levels.

2. Massez doucement par mouvements circulaires jusqu'à absorption complète.
3. Utilisez matin et/ou soir avant votre crème habituelle.

# The Power of Argan for Firmer Skin ✨



Restore your skin's natural glow with this anti-aging serum enriched with **Argan Oil**. Its light, fluid texture absorbs instantly to provide deep hydration and targeted action against the signs of aging.



### Key Benefits:

* **Smoothing & Firming:** Day after day, the skin becomes suppler and more toned, while fine lines are visibly reduced.

* **Instant Radiance:** Upon application, the complexion is nourished and brighter without a greasy finish.

* **Natural Commitment:** Formulated with **97% ingredients of natural origin**, silicone-free, and made in France.

* **Ethical Sourcing:** Features pure Argan oil sourced from women's cooperatives in Morocco.

products.description_en:
# Le remède naturel des cheveux fins et fatigués 🍇

Redonnez vie et tenue à votre chevelure. Ce **Shampooing Professionnel** sans sulfate est un véritable soin revitalisant pour les cheveux fins et dévitalisés. Grâce à la puissance des **Tanins**, il agit comme un tuteur naturel pour la fibre : il lisse les frisottis et apporte de la souplesse tout en redonnant de la force et du corps aux cheveux les plus plats.

**Pourquoi il va changer votre routine :**
* **Énergie & Vitalité :** L'extrait de vin riche en tanins stimule et revitalise la fibre capillaire pour un aspect plus sain.
* **Lissage sans Alourdir :** Détend les cheveux et élimine l'aspect "mousseux" tout en préservant le volume naturel des cheveux fins.
* **Brillance Miroir :** Referme les écailles pour protéger le cheveu et lui redonner un éclat immédiat.

💡 **Le conseil de l'expert :** Les cheveux fins s'emmêlent souvent plus vite. Pour éviter de les casser, commencez par brosser vos cheveux *avant* de passer sous la douche. Cela permet au shampooing de bien circuler entre les mèches et facilite grandement le rinçage.
products.usageTips:
# The natural remedy for fine and lifeless hair 🍇

Bring life and body back to your hair. This sulfate-free **Professional Shampoo** is a true revitalizing treatment for fine and devitalized hair. Thanks to the power of **Tannins**, it acts as a natural support for the fiber: it smoothes frizz and adds suppleness while restoring strength and body to even the flattest hair.

**Why it stands out:**
* **Energy & Vitality:** Wine extract rich in tannins stimulates and revitalizes the hair fiber for a healthier look.
* **Weightless Smoothing:** Relaxes the hair and eliminates "frizzy" textures while preserving the natural volume of fine hair.
* **Mirror Shine:** Seals the hair cuticles to protect the strands and restore immediate radiance.

💡 **Expert Tip:** Fine hair tends to tangle more easily. To avoid breakage, brush your hair *before* hopping in the shower. This allows the shampoo to circulate better between strands and makes rinsing much easier.

Protect your color intensity with the gentleness of nature. This **Professional Shampoo** is a true rejuvenating treatment for highlighted and color-treated hair. Its clean formula gently cleanses without ever altering the pigments, while restoring suppleness and mirror-like shine to your hair.

* **Anti-Fading Shield:** Its sulfate-free, paraben-free, and silicone-free base naturally washes your hair while respecting the fiber and color longevity.
* **Natural Radiance:** Grape seed and pomegranate extracts provide powerful antioxidants to protect the color from external aggressions.
* **Absolute Suppleness:** A revitalizing action that leaves hair feeling light, silky, and incredibly easy to style.

💡 **Expert Tip:** To preserve your highlights even longer, rinse your shampoo with lukewarm or even cool water if you're feeling brave! Hot water tends to open the hair cuticles, allowing color pigments to escape.

products.description_en:
# The first step in your reconstruction ritual 💎

More than just a wash, a true infusion of care. This sulfate-free **Professional Shampoo** was designed to cleanse your hair with infinite gentleness while initiating its repair. Its formula, rich in **Keratin** and **Castor Oil**, prepares the fiber for deep treatment.

**Your daily benefits:**
* **Respectful Cleansing:** Its sulfate-free cleansing base removes impurities without stripping the hair fiber, thus preserving natural moisture.
* **Protective Shield:** Acts as a protective and revitalizing treatment that strengthens hair from the roots.
* **Restorative Action:** Helps rebuild the hair structure for a visibly more vigorous and lively mane.

💡 **Expert Tip:** Since it is sulfate-free, it may lather slightly less than a classic shampoo. Do not add more product! Simply add a little water during the massage to emulsify the texture and release all the strengthening active ingredients.

products.description:
Un shampooing pour cheveux secs, difficiles à lisser ou sujets à la casse.

Sa formule au cranberry et à l'huile d'argan aide à protéger les cheveux du dessèchement, à nourrir la fibre et à réduire la casse. Les longueurs retrouvent douceur, souplesse et brillance.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Huile d'argan pour nourrir et adoucir.
- Cranberry pour protéger les cheveux fragilisés.
- Aide à lutter contre la casse.
- Facilite le lissage et le coiffage.

**Résultat :** des cheveux plus souples, plus brillants et moins difficiles à discipliner.

Sa formule à l'huile d'argan et à la kératine aide à protéger la fibre et à garder les pigments plus longtemps. Les cheveux paraissent plus doux, plus brillants et mieux entretenus.

- Aide à retenir la couleur au coeur de la fibre.
- Huile d'argan pour nourrir.
- Kératine pour renforcer et lisser.

Un soin de jour gel-crème pour hydrater les peaux normales à mixtes avec fraîcheur.

Sa texture légère se transforme en eau à l'application et pénètre sans fini gras. L'huile de coco bio, l'eau de coco et l'extrait de pivoine aident à désaltérer la peau et à raviver l'éclat du teint.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Texture fraîche, légère et non collante.
- Hydrate les peaux normales à mixtes.
- Huile de coco bio et eau de coco pour le confort.
- 99% d'ingrédients d'origine naturelle.

**Résultat :** une peau plus souple, fraîche et lumineuse.
products.title: Soin de Jour Hydratant - Huile de Coco Bio
products.description_en:
# A wave of tropical freshness for your face ✨

**Lovea Moisturizing Day Care** is the perfect ally to quench and protect normal to combination skin all day long. Its innovative "gel-cream" texture transforms into water upon application for an immediate feeling of freshness, with no greasy or sticky finish. Enriched with Organic Coconut Oil, Coconut Water, and Peony Extract, this treatment restores suppleness and natural radiance to your complexion. Its certified Organic, 99% natural origin formula wraps your skin in an addictive, 100% natural coconut scent.

**Why you'll love it:**
* **"Splash" Hydration:** A lightweight texture that instantly quenches the skin.
* **Natural Radiance:** Peony extract revives the complexion for a healthy glow (80% satisfaction*).
* **Organic Purity:** COSMOS ORGANIC certified, silicone-free, and 99% natural origin.
* **Gourmet Scent:** A fresh and sweet coconut fragrance, 100% natural.

💡 **Expert Tip:** Thanks to its fast-absorbing gel-cream texture, this care makes an excellent makeup base. It provides enough hydration for dry areas while respecting the T-zone (forehead, nose, chin) of combination skin.
products.usageTips_en: Apply every morning to a cleansed face and neck. Gently massage to allow the gel texture to absorb.
products.title_en: Moisturizing Day Care - Organic Coconut Oil
products.composition: Aqua (Water), Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Fruit Juice*, Glycerin, Octyldodecanol, Dicaprylyl Ether, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Oil*, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Erythritol, Parfum (Fragrance), Sclerotium Gum, Paeonia Lactiflora Root Extract, Tocopherol, Microcrystalline Cellulose, Xanthan Gum, Sodium Levulinate, Glyceryl Caprylate, Sodium Anisate, Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Citric Acid.

- Aloe vera pour hydrater intensément.
- Thé vert pour ses propriétés antioxydantes et purifiantes.
- Texture légère qui pénètre vite.

products.description_en:
# Moisturizing Day Care: Freshness & Balance 🌿

Specially formulated for normal to combination skin, this daily treatment provides an immediate sensation of freshness while boosting skin hydration. Its lightweight texture absorbs quickly, leaving your skin healthy and balanced all day long.

### Why you'll love it:
* **Natural Active Duo:** Aloe Vera for intense hydration and Green Tea extract, rich in antioxidants, to refresh the skin.
* **Balanced Complexion:** Helps the skin regain its natural balance and reboots water levels.
* **Clean Beauty:** Formulated with **98% ingredients of natural origin**, silicone-free for a reduced environmental footprint.
* **Results:** Skin feels fresh and moisturized all day, regaining its natural radiance.
products.usageTips: Appliquez chaque matin sur un visage et un cou soigneusement nettoyés. Faites pénétrer en effectuant de légers massages circulaires. Idéal comme base de maquillage grâce à son fini non gras.

products.description:
Un soin de nuit nourrissant pour aider la peau à retrouver fermeté et confort pendant le sommeil.

Sa formule associe pro-collagène végétal, soja, réglisse et gomme mâle pour nourrir, lisser et améliorer l'apparence du teint. Au réveil, la peau paraît plus douce et plus reposée.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Aide à lisser rides et ridules.
- Pro-collagène et soja pour soutenir la fermeté.
- Réglisse pour un teint plus uniforme.
- 88% d'ingrédients d'origine naturelle.

**Astuce :** applique le soir sur peau propre, en massant du centre du visage vers l'extérieur.
products.title: Soin de Nuit Lift+ Nourrissant
products.composition: AQUA ; ETHYLHEXYL PALMITATE ; HEXANEDIOL ; GLYCERIN ; CI 16035 ; CI 77891 ; CARTHAMUS TINCTORIUS ; CAPRYLIC/CAPRIC TRIGLYCERIDE ; BEHENYL ALCOHOL ; SEED OIL ; SORBITOL ; TALC ; TAURINE ; PANTHENOL ; ALLANTOIN ; TOCOPHEROL ; EQUISETUM ARVENSE EXTRACT ; DIMETHICONE ; POTASSIUM CETYL PHOSPHATE ; SODIUM CARBOMER ; HYDROGENATED PALM GLYCERIDES ; PARFUM ; PHENOXYETHANOL ; BENZOIC ACID ; GOMME MÂLE ; RÉGLISSE.

products.description_en:
# Wake up to youthful-looking skin every morning ✨

PH 7 LIFT+ Night Care is a true overnight youth treatment. Designed to meet the needs of all skin types, it provides intense nutrition and targeted firmness to restore skin elasticity while you sleep. Its unique formula combines the smoothing power of Mastic Gum and Licorice with the effectiveness of Plant Pro-Collagen. Night after night, wrinkles and fine lines are visibly reduced, and your skin regains its softness and comfort.

**Why you'll love it:**
* **Double Firming Action:** Pro-Collagen and Soy active work together to tighten skin tissues.
* **Natural Radiance:** Licorice extract helps even out the complexion and reduce signs of fatigue.
* **Intense Regeneration:** 88% natural origin ingredients for plumped skin upon waking.

💡 **Expert Tip:** Skin regenerates mostly between 11 PM and 4 AM. Apply your cream using gentle pinching motions along the jawline: this stimulates microcirculation and boosts the absorption of the "LIFT" actives for even more visible results.
products.usageTips: Appliquez chaque soir sur un visage et un cou parfaitement nettoyés. Massez délicatement pour faire pénétrer la texture onctueuse avant le coucher.

products.description:
Une crème riche à l'argan bio pour nourrir les peaux sèches et sensibles.

Sa formule associe huile d'argan bio, aloe vera bio et acide hyaluronique pour hydrater, apaiser et assouplir la peau. La texture réconfortante laisse le visage plus doux et mieux nourri.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Nutrition intense pour les peaux sèches.
- Huile d'argan bio pour réparer et adoucir.
- Aloe vera et acide hyaluronique pour hydrater.
- Parfum chaud d'origine naturelle.

**Résultat :** une peau plus souple, plus confortable et moins tiraillée.

products.description_en:
# Organic comfort for dry and sensitive skin ✨

**Garnier BIO Rich Argan Nourishing Care** is a certified organic face cream designed to provide intense and lasting nourishment. Its expert formula is powered by Organic Argan Oil from Morocco, renowned for its highly nourishing and repairing properties. Enriched with Organic Aloe Vera and Hyaluronic Acid, this treatment instantly hydrates the skin, leaving it suppler, softer, and perfectly soothed. With its warm and comforting 100% natural fragrance, it transforms your routine into a moment of pure well-being.

**Why you'll love it:**
* **Intense Nutrition:** Organic Argan, rich in fatty acids, repairs dry patches.
* **24h Hydration:** Hyaluronic Acid and Aloe Vera plump and quench the skin.
* **Visible Softness:** In one week, 80% of women find their skin more supple*.
* **Clean & Committed:** Vegan formula, COSMOS ORGANIC certified by Ecocert, no animal-derived ingredients.

💡 **Expert Tip:** This care is a must-have for skin that feels tight. For even deeper nutrition, apply a more generous layer in the evening as a "night mask" to wake up with radiant skin.
products.usageTips: Appliquez matin et soir sur le visage propre en mouvements circulaires. Pour une nutrition intense, utilisez une dose plus généreuse le soir avant le coucher.
Vaporisez sur une peau propre (visage ou corps), puis massez par mouvements circulaires jusqu'à absorption complète. S'utilise matin et soir.
products.description_en:
# A perfect and radiant complexion in 10 seconds flat 💫

Achieve an instant "porcelain skin" effect with this innovative spray. Its unique formula with goat milk and collagen immediately evens out the skin tone while providing deep moisturizing care. Ideal for blurring dark areas and restoring a lasting glow to your face and body.

**Key benefits:**
* **Flash Radiance:** Evens out and brightens the complexion from the very first application.
* **Intense Nutrition:** Goat milk and Vitamin C nourish the skin for extreme softness.
* **Lightweight Texture:** Absorbs quickly without sticking, leaving the skin supple and fresh.

💡 **Expert Tip:** Perfect for evening out the skin tone on legs or the neckline before going out, or as a luminous primer in the morning.
products.usageTips_en: Spray onto clean skin (face or body), then massage in circular motions until fully absorbed. Use morning and night.
products.composition: HYDROLYZED MILK COLLAGEN, VITAMIN C, GOAT MILK EXTRACT, AQUA, GLYCERIN, TITANIUM DIOXIDE.

Un spray éclaircissant instantané pour unifier et illuminer la peau rapidement.

Sa formule au lait de chèvre et au collagène aide à estomper les zones d'ombre et à donner un effet teint plus uniforme. La texture légère pénètre vite et laisse la peau fraîche, souple et lumineuse.

- Effet éclat immédiat.
- Aide à uniformiser le teint du visage ou du corps.
- Lait de chèvre et collagène pour le confort.

products.description_en:
# High-performance sun protection, naturally ☀️

Celenes Sun Care Spray provides total protection against harmful UVA/UVB rays through its blend of intensive active, mineral, and organic sun filters. Its water-resistant formula helps prevent premature aging, sunspots, and sunburns while remaining gentle on the skin.

**Why you'll love it:**
* **Very High Protection:** SPF 50+ rating for maximum safety against the sun.
* **Herbal Formula:** Infused with natural extracts and olive oil to keep skin hydrated.
* **For Everyone:** Suitable for all ages and all skin types.
* **Water Resistant:** Designed for long-lasting protection during outdoor and water activities.
* **Vegan Choice:** Certified Vegan formula.
products.usageTips_en:
1. Apply 20 minutes before sun exposure.
2. Spread the product evenly across the skin using circular motions.
3. Reapply frequently, especially after swimming or towel drying.
products.usageTips:
1. Appliquer 20 minutes avant l'exposition au soleil.
2. Répartir le produit de manière homogène sur la peau avec des mouvements circulaires.
3. Renouveler l'application régulièrement, surtout après chaque baignade.
products.description:
Une très haute protection solaire pour protéger la peau au quotidien.

Ce spray SPF 50+ aide à protéger contre les rayons UVA/UVB, les coups de soleil et le vieillissement prématuré lié au soleil. Sa texture fluide s’applique facilement et convient à toute la famille.

**Pourquoi on l’aime :**
- Très haute protection SPF 50+
- Aide à prévenir les taches et les brûlures
- Résiste à l’eau
- Convient à tous les types de peaux
- Formule vegan enrichie en extraits naturels

**Astuce :**
Réappliquez régulièrement, surtout après la baignade, la transpiration ou le séchage avec une serviette.
products.title: Spray Solaire Lotion SPF 50+

products.usageTips_en:
1. Apply to damp hair.
2. Distribute through the lengths and blow-dry.
3. For intense straightening, finish with a blow-out or a flat iron.
products.description_en:
# Your professional shield against heat damage

Lisas Thermo-Active+ spray is a professional-grade treatment designed to protect your hair from daily thermal stress. Its advanced formula ensures effective protection against styling tool heat up to 230°C. Enriched with nourishing ingredients, this spray makes styling easier while leaving your hair shiny and controlled.

**Why you'll love it:**
* **Thermal Shield:** High-performance protection up to 230°C to safeguard the hair fiber.
* **Dual Nourishing Action:** Combines the power of Keratin and Argan Oil to strengthen and soften the hair.
* **Anti-Frizz & Anti-Dryness:** Tames frizz and prevents hair from becoming dull or brittle due to heat exposure.
* **Leave-In Formula:** Quick and convenient application for an immediate silky finish.

💡 **Expert tip:** For even protection, spray section by section throughout the hair before using your flat iron or blow dryer. This creates a consistent protective barrier on every strand.
products.composition: Eau traitée, Kératine hydrolysée, Huile de ricin hydrogénée, Huile d'argan, Huile d'amande douce, Merytol 318, Coco Caprylate, Caprylyl Carbonate, Vitamine E, Chloro Méthyle Isothiazolinone, Méthyle Isothiazolinone, Parfum.

1. Appliquer sur cheveux humides.
2. Répartir sur les longueurs puis sécher les cheveux.
3. Pour un lissage intense, finaliser par un brushing ou à l'aide d'un fer à lisser.
products.description:
Un spray thermo-protecteur pour protéger les cheveux avant le brushing, le lisseur ou le boucleur.

Il aide à préserver la fibre capillaire de la chaleur jusqu'à 230°C. Sa formule à la kératine et à l'huile d'argan nourrit, discipline les frisottis et laisse les cheveux plus brillants.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Protection thermique jusqu'à 230°C.
- Kératine pour renforcer la fibre.
- Huile d'argan pour adoucir.
- Aide à limiter frisottis, sécheresse et casse.

**Astuce :** vaporise sur cheveux humides ou secs avant d'utiliser un appareil chauffant.

products.description_en:
# Absolute Elegance & Long-Lasting Wear

Elevate your makeup game with the Velvet Lipstick Matt Waterproof. Designed for those who refuse to compromise between comfort and performance, this lipstick delivers intense color in a single stroke. Its velvety texture glides effortlessly onto the lips, leaving a sophisticated matte finish that withstands everything: water, heat, and kisses.

**Why you'll love it:**

* **Velvet Matte Finish:** An ultra-matte texture that remains elegant and modern with zero shine.
* **High Pigmentation:** Deep, vibrant colors for an immediate visual impact.
* **Waterproof & Transfer-proof:** A formula that stays put and remains intact all day long.
* **Total Comfort:** Non-drying formula that feels lightweight and comfortable on the lips.
* **Luxurious Design:** A stunning gold, ergonomic case, perfect for your handbag.

> **Beauty Tip:** For flawless results, exfoliate your lips before application. Start from the center of your lips and blend outward for perfect definition.

**Available Shades:**
* **N°04:** Deep Burgundy / Black Cherry (Bold & Intense)
* **N°05:** Mystic Plum / Dark Chocolate (Dark & Sophisticated)
* **N°08:** Dusty Rose / Antique Pink (Soft & Romantic)
* **N°01:** Amber Nude / Terracotta (Warm & Natural)
* **N°06:** Lilac Pink / Soft Mauve (Fresh & Bright)
products.description:
Un rouge à lèvres mat waterproof pour une couleur intense et longue tenue.

Sa texture veloutée glisse facilement sur les lèvres et offre un fini mat sophistiqué. La formule résiste à l'eau, à la chaleur et aux transferts tout en gardant une sensation légère.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Couleur intense dès le premier passage.
- Fini mat velours élégant.
- Waterproof et longue tenue.
- Sensation confortable, sans dessécher excessivement.

**Astuce :** applique sur lèvres bien hydratées pour un rendu plus lisse et plus net.
products.title: Velvet lipstick Matt Waterproof

products.usageTips_en:
1. Preparation: Put on the protective gloves. In a non-metallic bowl, mix the color cream tube and the developer emulsion at a 1:1 ratio until you obtain a perfectly smooth and creamy texture.
2. Application: Distribute the mixture evenly onto dry, unwashed hair, starting at the roots and then extending through the lengths.
3. Development Time: Leave it on to develop for **30 minutes**. 
4. Rinse & Care: Rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water until the water runs completely clear, then apply the 20 ml treatment sachet to seal the hair cuticles and nourish the hair. Leave it on for 2 minutes before rinsing out completely.
products.description_en:
# Achieve a deep, magnetic intense black with mirror-like shine! 🖤✨

Elevate your style with **Volume Color Cream (Shade 1 Black)** permanent hair color. Powered by "100% Extra Color" technology, this rich cream formula locks deep into the hair fiber to unleash a pure, multi-dimensional jet black. Enriched with natural conditioning ingredients, it actively protects, softens, and nourishes your hair throughout the coloring process. Experience an ultra-vibrant, fade-resistant color that leaves your hair feeling incredibly silky with a long-lasting, brilliant shine.

**Why you will love it:**
* **Intense Black Shade (1):** A classic, deep jet black for a bold and sophisticated look.
* **100% Extra Color:** High-density pigments ensure a rich, long-lasting color performance.
* **Softening & Nourishment:** Infused with natural ingredients to keep hair supple, smooth, and healthy-looking.
* **Mirror-Like Shine:** Delivers a high-gloss finish that brilliantly reflects light.
* **Flawless Grey Coverage:** Ensures 100% seamless coverage of white and grey hair from root to tip.

💡 **Expert Tip:** Always perform an allergy alert test 48 hours before coloring your hair. To maintain the striking depth and gloss of your black shade, use a dedicated sulfate-free routine for dark-colored hair and rinse with cool water to seal the hair cuticles.                           ### 📦 Box Content
* **Color Cream (Color Tube):** 2 x 40 ml (Ideal for measuring according to hair length)
* **Developer Emulsion (Application Envelopes):** 2 x 40 ml
* **Conditioning Treatment (Treatment Envelopes):** 2 x 20 ml
* **Accessories:** Instruction leaflet and protective gloves.

products.usageTips:
1. Préparation : Mettez les gants de protection. Dans un récipient non métallique, mélangez le tube de crème colorante et l'émulsion révélatrice dans un ratio de 1:1 jusqu'à l'obtention d'une texture parfaitement crèmeuse.
2. Application : Répartissez uniformément le mélange sur cheveux secs et non lavés, en commençant par les racines puis en étirant sur les longueurs.
3. Temps de Pause : Laissez agir pendant **30 minutes**. 
4. Rinçage & Soin : Rincez abondamment à l'eau tiède jusqu'à ce que l'eau soit claire, puis appliquez le sachet de traitement de 20 ml pour refermer les écailles et nourrir le cheveu. Laissez poser 2 minutes avant de rincer définitivement.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**
- Noir intense et lumineux.
- Couleur permanente longue tenue.
- Technologie 100% Extra Color pour un résultat vibrant.
- Formule avec ingrédients naturels pour préserver la douceur.

Une coloration permanente blond doré pour un résultat lumineux et chaleureux.

Volume Color Cream nuance 7.3 Blond Doré apporte des reflets dorés naturels et une couleur durable. Sa formule aide à nourrir les cheveux pendant la coloration pour garder douceur et brillance.

**Pourquoi on l'aime :**

products.usageTips:
1. Préparation : Enfilez des gants appropriés. Dans un bol non métallique, mélangez la crème colorante avec le révélateur (volume emulsion) dans un ratio de 1:1 (ou 1:2 pour les nuances très claires) jusqu'à obtenir un mélange homogène.
2. Application : Appliquez le mélange sur cheveux secs et non lavés, en utilisant les méthodes habituelles.
3. Temps de Pause : Laissez agir le mélange sur les cheveux pendant 30 minutes pour les couleurs normales (laissez agir 45 minutes pour les couleurs claires).
4. Rinçage : Une fois le temps de pose écoulé, rincez doucement et abondamment les cheveux à l'eau tiède.
products.description_en:
# Illuminate your hair with a vibrant, long-lasting golden blond! ✨💇‍♀️

Discover **Volume Color Cream (Shade 7.3 Golden Blond)**, the ultimate solution for vibrant color and intensive care. Engineered with "100% Extra Color" technology, this color cream delivers a luminous golden blond, rich with warm, natural reflects. Its unique formula is enriched with natural ingredients to deeply nourish your hair during the coloring process, leaving it incredibly soft, supple, and shiny. Achieve a professional result at home with enduring brilliant shine.

**Why you will love it:**
* **Golden Blond Shade (7.3):** A rich, radiant color for a natural sun-kissed effect.
* **100% Extra Color:** Superior color performance for a vibrant, long-lasting result.
* **Long-Lasting Shine:** Your hair stays luminous and brilliant for weeks.
* **Natural Ingredients Care:** Softens and nourishes the hair fiber for healthy-looking hair.
* **Perfect White Hair Coverage:** Ensures even and flawless coverage.

💡 **Expert Tip:** Always perform an allergy alert test 48 hours before coloring your hair. To keep your golden blond vibrant and full of shine, use color-protecting shampoo and conditioner and avoid prolonged sun exposure without protection.
products.usageTips_en:
1. Preparation: Put on suitable gloves. In a non-metallic bowl, mix the color cream with the developer (volume emulsion) in a 1:1 ratio (or 1:2 for very light shades) until a homogeneous mixture is obtained.
2. Application: Apply the mixture onto dry and unwashed hair, using the usual methods.
3. Development Time: Leave the mixture on the hair for 30 minutes for normal colors (leave for 45 minutes for light colors).
4. Rinsing: Once the development time is over, gently and thoroughly rinse the hair with lukewarm water.
